d16c07bc5b91.lineage: Blueberry x Purple Panty Dropper (Humboldt Seed Co.)
d16c07bc5b91.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety, mild pain, insomnia, depression
d16c07bc5b91.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild couch-lock at higher doses
d16c07bc5b91.aroma: Sweet fresh blueberries, baked muffin dough, light vanilla cream, subtle herbal earthiness
d16c07bc5b91.misc: Created by Humboldt Seed Co. THC typically 18–23%. Dense colorful buds with deep purple hues and orange hairs. A crowd-pleasing, beginner-friendly strain known for its approachable flavor and balanced effects. Great intro strain for new consumers.

9bd115b860af.lineage: Alien Cookies x Kush Mints #11 (Capulator / Cap Junky Genetics)
9bd115b860af.therapeutic: Stress, anxiety, depression, chronic pain, appetite stimulation
9bd115b860af.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, possible paranoia in sensitive users at high doses
9bd115b860af.aroma: Pungent fuel and diesel, sweet pine, cooling menthol, spiced earth, faint fruity finish
9bd115b860af.misc: Bred by renowned breeder Capulator (creator of MAC). Often cited as one of the best modern hybrids. THC 22–30%+. Fast-hitting cerebral rush followed by warm body relaxation. Popular in dispensaries nationwide for consistent potency and terpene expression.

c7bc9b6b18c2.lineage: The Soap x Velvet Runtz (Campfire Cannabis in-house cross)
c7bc9b6b18c2.therapeutic: Stress, fatigue, depression, mild chronic pain, creative blocks
c7bc9b6b18c2.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, occasional anxiety at high doses
c7bc9b6b18c2.aroma: Clean soapy citrus, sweet mixed berry, light diesel backbone, faint pine and earthy woods
c7bc9b6b18c2.misc: House cross by Campfire Cannabis combining The Soap's clean citrus with Velvet Runtz candy sweetness. THC 20–25%. Versatile hybrid — sativa-leaning first hour then settles into relaxed body state. Great for daytime creative work or afternoon social sessions.

2223f6ee76a3.therapeutic: Insomnia, chronic pain, stress, anxiety, muscle tension
2223f6ee76a3.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, heavy sedation — not for daytime use
2223f6ee76a3.aroma: Earthy OG pine with sweet candy citrus, creamy tropical undertones, classic kush musk base
2223f6ee76a3.misc: Combines Tahoe OG's heavy-hitting indica body stone with Runtz's sweet candy genetics. THC 25–30%. Dense frosty buds. The OG backbone delivers reliable potency and full-body relaxation while Runtz adds dessert sweetness. Best for evening wind-down or pre-sleep.

f9a02875b44a.lineage: MAC (Miracle Alien Cookies) x Grape Stomper (Gage Green Seeds)
f9a02875b44a.therapeutic: Chronic pain, stress, insomnia, mood disorders, nausea
f9a02875b44a.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, couch-lock at high doses
f9a02875b44a.aroma: Creamy grape candy, sweet apple, citrus zest, light floral, earthy funk on the finish
f9a02875b44a.misc: Cross of two award-winning genetics. MAC contributes creamy citrus and potency; Grape Stomper adds grape and fruit sweetness. THC 24–29%. Available in half-ounce — great value buy. Dense, trichome-heavy flowers with deep purple and green hues. Best for evening use.

8ddb5a864d39.lineage: Purple Panty Dropper x Blueberry (Humboldt Seed Co.)
8ddb5a864d39.therapeutic: Stress, anxiety, mild pain, insomnia, depression, appetite
8ddb5a864d39.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild couch-lock at higher doses
8ddb5a864d39.aroma: Sweet fresh blueberries, baked muffin dough, light vanilla cream, subtle herbal earthiness
8ddb5a864d39.misc: Humboldt Seed Co. genetics. THC 15–22%. Dense, colorful buds with purple hues. One of the most recognizable and approachable flavor profiles in cannabis — sweet, fruity, and non-offensive. Great recommendation for new consumers or those sensitive to heavy indicas.

d024338fee18.lineage: Animal Mints x Kush Mints (Seed Junky Genetics)
d024338fee18.therapeutic: Depression, fatigue, stress, anxiety, mild chronic pain
d024338fee18.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, possible anxiety at high doses in novice users
d024338fee18.aroma: Clean floral soap, fresh mint, citrus zest, light cheese notes, pine — one of the most distinctive and refreshing terpene profiles in cannabis
d024338fee18.misc: Created by Seed Junky Genetics. Famously described as smelling like fresh soap or floral laundry detergent — a truly unique, clean aroma. THC 20–26%. Euphoric and uplifting with a clean, lasting head high. Strong daytime strain for focus and creativity.

1ff4b7efe819.lineage: (Biscotti x Sherb BX1) x Jealousy F2 (Compound Genetics / Seed Junky)
1ff4b7efe819.therapeutic: Insomnia, chronic pain, stress, appetite stimulation, muscle tension
1ff4b7efe819.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, heavy sedation — not for daytime use
1ff4b7efe819.aroma: Sweet grape diesel, rich berry, creamy dessert notes, faint chemical fuel on exhale
1ff4b7efe819.misc: Premium cross of high-end genetics. Biscotti x Sherb BX1 provides the creamy dessert foundation; Jealousy F2 adds potency and deep purple coloration. THC 25–30%+. Dense purple-tinted buds with heavy resin coverage. Hard-hitting indica-dominant — reserved for evening or experienced users.

6ba39e627a58.lineage: Chemdawg x Biscotti (Campfire Cannabis in-house cross)
6ba39e627a58.therapeutic: Stress, depression, appetite stimulation, fatigue, social anxiety
6ba39e627a58.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia possible at higher doses
6ba39e627a58.aroma: Savory earthy spice, herbal diesel, hints of plum and sweet fruit, subtle biscotti dough and vanilla on the finish
6ba39e627a58.misc: Campfire Cannabis in-house cross merging Chemdawg's pungent diesel potency with Biscotti's creamy sweetness. THC 18–24%. Social and giggly — great for group settings. Named for its spicy herbal aroma reminiscent of savory cuisine. Best for afternoon or evening social use.

265b210f94fe.lineage: Zkittlez x Gelato (Cookies Fam / Runtz brand)
265b210f94fe.therapeutic: Stress, anxiety, depression, chronic pain, appetite stimulation
265b210f94fe.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, possible sedation at high doses
265b210f94fe.aroma: Tropical candy sweetness, pineapple citrus, fruity Zkittlez notes, creamy Gelato undertone, light spice on exhale
265b210f94fe.misc: Bred by the Cookies Fam and widely regarded as one of the most influential strains of the 2020s. Named after the candy brand for its intense sweetness. THC 18–25%. Dense colorful buds. Rapid-hitting, well-balanced — euphoric head high paired with full-body relaxation. Nearly universally well-received.

99326fcf9900.lineage: GMO (Garlic Cookies) x Han-Solo Burger (Skunk House Genetics)
99326fcf9900.therapeutic: Inflammation, chronic pain, insomnia, stress, appetite stimulation
99326fcf9900.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, heavy sedation — not for daytime use. Can be overwhelming for novices.
99326fcf9900.aroma: Pungent gas and diesel, spicy savory garlic notes, sour lemon, hints of cheese and fuel — unmistakably GMO-forward
99326fcf9900.misc: Bred by Skunk House Genetics. Also known as GMO BX. One of the hardest-hitting indicas on the market — THC 25–30%+. Fast-acting, long-lasting body stone. Best reserved for evening or end-of-day use. Not for new consumers.

6a06396da757.lineage: Black Cherry Punch x Tropicana Cookies (Franchise Genetics)
6a06396da757.therapeutic: Stress, depression, fatigue, mild pain, creative blocks
6a06396da757.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, occasional mild anxiety
6a06396da757.aroma: Fresh orange and grapefruit citrus burst, sweet black cherry, earthy tropical undertones, faint cookie dough base
6a06396da757.misc: Bred by Franchise Genetics. One of the most vibrant citrus terpene profiles available. Combines Black Cherry Punch's sweet fruitiness with Tropicana Cookies' heavy citrus terps. THC 18–24%. Excellent daytime or social strain — uplifting, creative, mood-enhancing.

4b794faff189.therapeutic: Chronic pain, stress, inflammation, PTSD, insomnia
4b794faff189.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, couch-lock in higher doses
4b794faff189.aroma: Heavy diesel and pine resin, earthy fuel, faint sweet fruit undertone, nutty finish with floral accents from Jokerz genetics
4b794faff189.misc: Combines GG4's legendary resin production and potency with Jokerz' complex terpene structure. THC 20–26%. Heavy-duty sticky flowers. Starts with cerebral creative energy, then melts into full-body relaxation. Named for its extreme stickiness — scissors-clogging resin production.

e1138882d6cd.lineage: Mexican Sativa x Chemdawg (origin New York City, popularized 1990s)
e1138882d6cd.therapeutic: Depression, fatigue, stress, ADHD, chronic pain
e1138882d6cd.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, anxiety or racing thoughts in sensitive users
e1138882d6cd.aroma: Sharp diesel fuel, pungent lemon citrus, skunk, earthy pine — one of the most recognizable cannabis aromas of the past 30 years
e1138882d6cd.misc: A legendary sativa from the 1990s NYC underground. At 80.3% THC in vape form, delivers Sour Diesel's iconic cerebral rush in concentrated form. Fast-acting, energizing, and creative. Perfect for daytime. One of the most culturally significant cannabis strains ever produced.

184eb9c71846.lineage: Grape Ape x Zkittlez (also known as Grape Zkittlez)
184eb9c71846.therapeutic: Stress, anxiety, mild pain, mood enhancement, appetite
184eb9c71846.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, potential drowsiness at higher doses
184eb9c71846.aroma: Intense grape candy, mixed berry compote, sweet citrus, tropical Zkittlez notes, light earthy base
184eb9c71846.misc: Natural cross combining Grape Ape's deep grape flavor with Zkittlez' candy sweetness. THC 19–24%. Dense colorful buds with purple hues. Well-balanced hybrid — calming without being fully sedating. Popular for its distinctive grape-forward flavor profile. Good afternoon/social strain.

b0990993b588.lineage: OG Kush x Durban Poison (Cookies Fam, San Francisco)
b0990993b588.therapeutic: Chronic pain, PTSD, depression, nausea, appetite stimulation
b0990993b588.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, possible paranoia at high doses
b0990993b588.aroma: Sweet minty cookie dough, earthy OG musk, lemon zest, cherry notes, hint of pine
b0990993b588.misc: One of the most culturally impactful strains of the 2010s — spawned an entire family of legendary crosses (Gelato, Sunset Sherbet, MAC, Runtz). At 80.5% THC in vape form. Euphoric rush followed by full-body relaxation. Complex, layered high — ideal for afternoon or evening.

a64e2855f46b.lineage: Brazilian Sativa x South Indian Indica (Green House Seeds, Netherlands, 1994)
a64e2855f46b.therapeutic: Depression, stress, anxiety, fatigue, mild chronic pain
a64e2855f46b.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, possible anxiety or racing thoughts at high doses
a64e2855f46b.aroma: Fresh pine resin, earthy spice, faint sweet floral notes, light sandalwood and cedar
a64e2855f46b.misc: A Dutch cannabis classic and multiple Cannabis Cup winner from 1994. Green House Seeds original genetics. At 81% THC in vape form delivers White Widow's characteristic balanced, clear-headed high in concentrated form. Balanced hybrid with slight sativa lean. One of the most globally recognized strains.

3f9c768ad3ef.lineage: Chem's Sister x Sour Dubb x Chocolate Diesel (GG Strains)
3f9c768ad3ef.therapeutic: Chronic pain, insomnia, PTSD, depression, muscle spasms
3f9c768ad3ef.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, heavy sedation — can be overwhelming for novice users
3f9c768ad3ef.aroma: Pungent diesel and mocha chocolate, earthy pine resin, coffee grounds, chemical fuel — one of the most recognizable aromas in cannabis
3f9c768ad3ef.misc: One of the most iconic strains ever created. Multiple Cannabis Cup winner. Bred by GG Strains. THC 25–32%. Extremely sticky, resin-coated buds. Powerful and fast-acting — couch-lock is common at higher doses. Best reserved for experienced users in the evening.

9934b135c2db.lineage: Not strain-specific — THC distillate infused gummies
9934b135c2db.therapeutic: Chronic pain, insomnia, stress, anxiety — long-lasting body-focused relief (4–8 hours)
9934b135c2db.negative: Delayed onset 30–90 min. Do NOT re-dose too early. Dry mouth, possible paranoia if over-consumed. Start low.
9934b135c2db.misc: Grasslandz brand. 100mg total THC per package — 10mg per piece (10 pieces). Lab-tested distillate. Edibles provide longer-lasting, body-focused effects vs inhalation. Onset 30–90 min, peak 2–4 hrs, total duration 4–8 hrs. Ideal for sleep and extended pain relief. New consumers: start with 5mg (half piece).

45e8067b787c.lineage: Black Dahlia x Ace of Spades (Stargaze premium vape line)
45e8067b787c.therapeutic: Stress, mild pain, mood disorders, anxiety, relaxation
45e8067b787c.aroma: Dark sweet cherries, berry compote, floral grape, earthy funk — rich and wine-like
45e8067b787c.misc: Stargaze premium vape. Black Dahlia x Ace of Spades delivers a rich, fruity berry experience. At 82.9% THC. Currently out of stock — restocks periodically. Indica-leaning hybrid known for its distinctive dark fruit flavor profile. Worth asking staff about restock timing.

961994b89518.lineage: Not strain-specific — THC distillate infused gummies
961994b89518.therapeutic: Chronic pain, insomnia, stress, anxiety — long-lasting body-focused relief (4–8 hours)
961994b89518.negative: Delayed onset 30–90 min. Do NOT re-dose too early. Dry mouth, possible paranoia if over-consumed. Start low.
961994b89518.misc: Grasslandz brand. 100mg total THC per package — 10mg per piece (10 pieces). Lab-tested distillate. Edibles ideal for those who prefer not to inhale or need longer-duration relief. Onset 30–90 min. New consumers: start with 5mg (half piece) and wait the full 90 minutes before re-evaluating.

d6623d889658.lineage: Grape Pie x Wedding Crasher x Ice Cream Cake (Bloom Seed Co.)
d6623d889658.therapeutic: Chronic pain, insomnia, stress relief, anxiety reduction
d6623d889658.negative: Couch-lock at high doses, dry mouth, dry eyes
d6623d889658.aroma: Sweet grape soda, ripe berry, whipped vanilla cream, doughy sweetness with faint gasoline on exhale
d6623d889658.misc: Bred by Harry Palms (Bloom Seed Co.), former head breeder at Oni Seed Co. THC typically 20–29%. Dense resinous buds with purple hues and heavy trichome coverage. Award-adjacent — recognized as a modern dessert strain classic. Strong indica-dominant effects best suited to evening use.

7f7ffa3551e7.lineage: Girl Scout Cookies x Sherbet (Cookies Fam Genetics — Gelato #45 phenotype)
7f7ffa3551e7.therapeutic: Stress, depression, chronic pain, PTSD, nausea
7f7ffa3551e7.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild sedation at high doses
7f7ffa3551e7.aroma: Sweet berry and orange sherbet, creamy vanilla, herbal pepper, faint woody kush undertone
7f7ffa3551e7.misc: Gelato #45 is one of the most prized phenotypes from the original Gelato line by the Cookies Fam. Lower THC (15–20%) than newer genetics but world-class terpene expression and euphoric effects. Dense, colorful buds. Balanced hybrid that reads more indica at higher doses. Exceptional flavor-to-effect ratio.

dbcb7ab15506.lineage: Ice Cream Cake x Blockberry (Redwood County Weed Co.)
dbcb7ab15506.therapeutic: Stress, anxiety, depression, mild pain, mood enhancement
dbcb7ab15506.aroma: Sweet berry cream, orange citrus, tropical fruit, light earthiness, vanilla cream finish
dbcb7ab15506.misc: Redwood County Weed Co. cultivar. Ice Cream Cake contributes creamy sweetness; Blockberry adds bold fruit and citrus. THC 14–18%. Approachable potency makes this excellent for daytime use or new consumers. Well-balanced, pleasant, mood-lifting — a safe bet for gift recommendations.

32de19b6f29e.lineage: Do-Si-Dos x Purple Punch (In House Genetics)
32de19b6f29e.therapeutic: Insomnia, chronic pain, stress, appetite stimulation, nausea
32de19b6f29e.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, heavy sedation — not for daytime use
32de19b6f29e.aroma: Tropical grape punch, sweet berry candy, herbal earthiness, faint spice — rich and indulgent
32de19b6f29e.misc: Bred by In House Genetics. Do-Si-Dos adds potency and body effect; Purple Punch contributes the sweet grape-tropical flavor. THC 20–28%. Dense purple flowers. One of the more potent indica-dominant strains on the menu. Fast-acting, long-lasting. Best for evening or nighttime use.

c697f763d6e1.lineage: Mendo Breath x Do-Si-Dos (Archive Seed Bank)
c697f763d6e1.therapeutic: Chronic pain, insomnia, stress, muscle tension, appetite stimulation
c697f763d6e1.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, heavy couch-lock at higher doses
c697f763d6e1.aroma: Sweet grape jelly, caramel, vanilla cream, earthy Mendo funk, hint of gas — like a fruity candy bar with a dank finish
c697f763d6e1.misc: Archive Seed Bank genetics. Mendo Breath delivers caramel-vanilla sweetness; Do-Si-Dos adds potency and berry fruitiness. THC 14–20%. Dense frosted flowers. Indica-dominant — powerful relaxation and sedation. Named for its distinctively sweet jelly-like aroma. Great for pain and sleep.

aadbe36acb08.lineage: Black Cherry Punch x Hash Church (Redwood County Weed Co.)
aadbe36acb08.therapeutic: Stress relief, mood enhancement, mild anxiety, fatigue
aadbe36acb08.aroma: Sweet cherry pine, skunky earthiness, floral undertones, light spice — aromatic and approachable
aadbe36acb08.misc: Redwood County Weed Co. cultivar. Named after the mythological Costa Rican spirit La Cegua. Hash Church genetics add classic old-school pungency; Black Cherry Punch contributes sweet cherry fruit. THC 15–19%. Balanced, approachable hybrid — a good entry point for newer consumers.

ae8b04d10a31.lineage: Alien Cookies x Kush Mints #11 (Capulator / Cap Junky Genetics)
ae8b04d10a31.therapeutic: Stress, anxiety, depression, chronic pain, appetite stimulation
ae8b04d10a31.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, possible paranoia at high doses in sensitive users
ae8b04d10a31.aroma: Pungent fuel and diesel, sweet pine, cooling menthol, spiced earth, faint fruity finish
ae8b04d10a31.misc: Redwood County Weed Co. cut of Cap Junky, one of the most decorated modern hybrids. Bred by Capulator (creator of MAC). THC 14–18% in this cut — more approachable potency than the flower version. Fast-hitting cerebral rush followed by warm body relaxation. Excellent daily driver.

57a8dde82c12.lineage: Las Vegas Lemon Skunk x Member Berry (Elev8 Seeds)
57a8dde82c12.therapeutic: Stress, depression, mild chronic pain, fatigue, mood enhancement
57a8dde82c12.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, possible slight anxiety
57a8dde82c12.aroma: Bright lemon citrus, sweet mixed berries, light skunky earthiness, pine, faint floral — vibrant and fresh
57a8dde82c12.misc: Elev8 Seeds genetics combining Las Vegas Lemon Skunk's tart citrus with Member Berry's berry candy sweetness. THC 12–16%. One of the most approachable potency levels on the menu — excellent for daytime use or newer consumers. Uplifting and creative without being overwhelming. Great starter pre-roll.

baa51ab3ca78.lineage: Grape Gas x Cereal Milk (Compound Genetics)
baa51ab3ca78.therapeutic: Stress, anxiety, mild pain, insomnia, mood disorders
baa51ab3ca78.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, potential drowsiness at higher doses
baa51ab3ca78.aroma: Grape soda and creamy milk sweetness, berry compote, light vanilla, earthy and slightly gassy base
baa51ab3ca78.misc: Compound Genetics cut. THC 28–35% in premium batches. Dense violet-tinted flowers packed with resin — excellent for both flower connoisseurs and hash makers. Calming with mood-lifting edge; not fully sedating at moderate doses. Great evening strain with dessert-like flavor.

b07cb1ec42ba.therapeutic: Stress relief, appetite stimulation, mild depression, fatigue, social anxiety
b07cb1ec42ba.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild sedation at high doses
b07cb1ec42ba.aroma: Tart green apple candy, lemon-lime citrus, sweet berry, light diesel in background, tropical fruit finish
b07cb1ec42ba.misc: A flavorful cross combining Sour Diesel's cerebral buzz with Cinderella 99's fruity sativa energy. At 76.8% THC in vape form. Delivers a sweet, clean experience — lighter and more approachable than pure Sour Diesel. Balanced, social, and uplifting. Good daytime or early evening vape.

e2b95f79aa58.lineage: Cotton Candy x Mythic OG (Atlas Seeds)
e2b95f79aa58.therapeutic: Stress relief, mood enhancement, muscle relaxation, mild pain, anxiety
e2b95f79aa58.aroma: Vibrant sweet fruit candy, tropical punch, light gassy undertone — room-filling aromatic presence
e2b95f79aa58.misc: Bred by Atlas Seeds. THC 20–25%+ (some batches 29%+). Fast flowering, high resin production. Best for afternoon or evening. Named for its nostalgic candy-like terpene profile. Works well for creative or social settings. New arrival — one of Avión's signature craft pre-rolls.

03df98cc7bf8.lineage: Cherry Kush x (Lemon Tree Papaya x GMO) x Fro'Do
03df98cc7bf8.therapeutic: Chronic pain, depression, mood swings, arthritis, muscle spasms and cramps
03df98cc7bf8.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild headache at high doses
03df98cc7bf8.aroma: Earthy spice, fresh woods, peppery zest, dank herbal cheese — like lemon-pepper parmesan with a funky GMO kick
03df98cc7bf8.misc: THC 18–23%, ~1% CBD. Named for its bold savory-citrus parmesan flavor. Cerebral flare up front followed by warming body waves. Dense olive-green buds with amber undertones. Great for social or creative sessions. New arrival — Avión's most unique flavor profile in the lineup.

7b052b7dd4f2.lineage: (Fro'Do x Alaskan Yeti) x LilMissHS (Phylos Bioscience autoflower genetics)
7b052b7dd4f2.therapeutic: Stress relief, mood enhancement, mild anxiety, relaxation
7b052b7dd4f2.aroma: Earthy and fruity with herbal lavender notes, light floral, subtle spice — bright and approachable
7b052b7dd4f2.misc: Phylos Bioscience autoflower genetics. THC ~20–25%. High resin production and stacking cola structure. Balanced hybrid experience — calm but not sedating. Great all-occasion strain suitable for a wider range of consumers. New arrival — Avión's most versatile pre-roll offering.

ce49eae04ae2.therapeutic: Stress relief, mild chronic pain, anxiety, insomnia, muscle tension, mood elevation
ce49eae04ae2.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, possible couch-lock at higher doses, mild dizziness in low-tolerance users, drowsiness
ce49eae04ae2.aroma: A lush wave of tropical fruit and sugary candy opens the nose, followed by a grounding undercurrent of earthy spice and subtle floral notes. The sweetness lingers with a hint of citrus zest that keeps it vibrant and inviting.
ce49eae04ae2.misc: Froot by the Foot is an indica-leaning hybrid crafted by Avió, combining the heavy resinous body of Mythic OG with the colorful, candy-forward sweetness of Candy Cane. At 20.1% THC, this cultivar sits in a moderate-to-potent range well-suited for evening or late-afternoon use when relaxation and mood lift are the goal. The myrcene-dominant terpene profile amplifies the sedative body effects, while limonene brightens the experience with euphoria and caryophyllene adds a peppery depth that may help with inflammation — making this a solid choice for consumers seeking a flavorful wind-down smoke.

45acbd932aeb.lineage: Cherry Kush x (Lemon Tree Papaya x GMO) x Fro'Do (Avió)
45acbd932aeb.therapeutic: Stress relief, mild anxiety, fatigue, mood elevation, mild pain management
45acbd932aeb.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia at higher doses, possible drowsiness in sensitive users
45acbd932aeb.aroma: Zesty Parm bursts with a sharp citrus-forward nose of fresh lemon zest and lime rind, layered beneath earthy, dank skunk and a savory garlic-funk courtesy of its GMO heritage. A subtle piney herbal backbone and cracked black pepper finish round out a complex, mouth-watering terpene profile.
45acbd932aeb.misc: This unique hybrid from Avió blends the sweet citrus genetics of Lemon Tree Papaya with the pungent, fuel-heavy earthiness of GMO and the fruity sweetness of Cherry Kush, anchored by Fro'Do for added resin and body depth. At 17.2% THC it sits in a moderate range — approachable for intermediate consumers while still delivering noticeable calming euphoria without heavy sedation. Best suited for late afternoon or early evening use when you want to decompress, stay mentally engaged, and enjoy a flavorful smoke session; the dominant Myrcene and Limonene pairing supports relaxation without full couch-lock.

956c29d611b1.lineage: (Fro'Do x Alaskan Yeti) x Lil Miss Hard Sauce — Fro'Do is a cross of Frozay x Dosi-Woah, Alaskan Yeti is a rare sativa-leaning hybrid with Alaskan Thunder Fuck heritage, and Lil Miss Hard Sauce (LilMissHS) is a terpene-rich hybrid known for fruity, fuel-forward profiles; bred under the Avió program
956c29d611b1.therapeutic: Stress relief, mild anxiety reduction, mood elevation, mental fatigue, mild pain management, appetite stimulation
956c29d611b1.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, potential mild paranoia at higher doses, mild dizziness for low-tolerance users; not ideal for those sensitive to sativa-leaning stimulation late at night
956c29d611b1.aroma: A bright and layered bouquet opens with zesty citrus and ripe tropical fruit driven by limonene, underpinned by a damp earthy musk from myrcene and rounded out with a sharp, herbal pine-spice note courtesy of terpinene that lingers pleasantly on the exhale.
956c29d611b1.misc: Produced by Avió, a brand focused on craft-quality pre-rolls with curated genetics; at 17.1% THC this is a moderate-strength sativa-leaning hybrid well-suited for daytime to early evening use when focus and calm are both desired. The buds typically present with light green hues, amber trichomes, and a slightly sticky resinous texture consistent with its Dosi-Woah and Hard Sauce ancestry. Best consumed by intermediate consumers looking for a balanced, uplifting yet grounded experience without heavy sedation.

e958853503bb.lineage: Mythic OG x Candy Cane (Avió / proprietary hybrid; Candy Cane is derived from AK-47 x Mango x White Widow lineage, while Mythic OG carries OG Kush heritage)
e958853503bb.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety reduction, mild chronic pain, muscle tension, insomnia onset, mood elevation
e958853503bb.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild dizziness at higher doses, potential couch-lock with overconsumption, may increase appetite
e958853503bb.aroma: A lush wave of sweet tropical fruit and citrus zest opens up front, layered beneath with earthy OG musk and a warm spiced undertone that lingers on the exhale. The candy-like sweetness is prominent but grounded by a subtle kushy dankness that keeps it from feeling one-dimensional.
e958853503bb.misc: Froot by the Foot is a branded pre-roll from Avió, a California-based cannabis company known for curated, flavor-forward cultivars; at 20.1% THC it sits in a solid mid-to-upper potency range suitable for intermediate consumers. The indica-leaning hybrid profile, driven by Myrcene and Caryophyllene, delivers a relaxing body effect without full sedation, making it best suited for late afternoon or evening use. Consumers seeking a flavorful, easygoing wind-down smoke will find this a well-balanced option, though newer users should take measured puffs given the THC content.

62d25dc9d10f.lineage: Cherry Kush x (Lemon Tree Papaya x GMO) x Fro'Do (Avió)
62d25dc9d10f.therapeutic: Stress relief, mild anxiety, mood elevation, mental fatigue, mild pain management
62d25dc9d10f.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia at higher doses, possible dizziness for low-tolerance users
62d25dc9d10f.aroma: Zesty Parm bursts with a sharp citrus-forward nose of fresh lemon zest and tangy lime rind, underpinned by funky garlic-diesel undertones inherited from GMO and a dank skunky earthiness that rounds out the profile with herbal pine resin on the exhale.
62d25dc9d10f.misc: Crafted by Avió, Zesty Parm is a sativa-leaning hybrid that draws its bright citrus character from the Lemon Tree Papaya lineage while GMO contributes a savory, funky depth that gives this strain its distinctive 'parmesan' quality — a nod likely reflected in the name. At 17.2% THC it sits in a moderate range suitable for intermediate consumers, offering a balanced experience that leans euphoric and clear-headed rather than sedating, making it well-suited for daytime to early evening use when focus and a lifted mood are desired without heavy couch-lock.

87fe23eebf9e.lineage: Fro'Do x Alaskan Yeti, then crossed with LilMissHS — Fro'Do is believed to be derived from Frodo Baggins-lineage genetics, Alaskan Yeti is a frosty sativa-dominant hybrid, and LilMissHS (Little Miss Headspace) adds a euphoric, uplifting character; produced under the Avió brand
87fe23eebf9e.therapeutic: Stress relief, mild anxiety reduction, mood elevation, mental fatigue, mild pain management, creative blocks
87fe23eebf9e.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia at higher doses for THC-sensitive users, possible light headedness; not ideal for severe anxiety sufferers due to sativa-leaning energy
87fe23eebf9e.aroma: A bright, resinous burst of tropical fruit and fresh-cut pine opens the nose, giving way to a subtle earthy spice reminiscent of crushed black pepper and warm citrus zest. The interplay of sweet and herbal notes lingers pleasantly, making it an approachable and inviting aromatic profile.
87fe23eebf9e.misc: Frodo Squeeze is an Avió house blend pre-roll sitting at a moderate 17.1% THC, making it well-suited for intermediate consumers or beginners seeking a gentle sativa-leaning experience without overwhelming potency. Buds are typically light green with moderate trichome coverage reflecting the Alaskan Yeti influence, and the myrcene-forward terpene profile tempers the sativa energy into a calm, focused headspace. Best enjoyed during late morning or early afternoon when productivity and a lifted mood are desired; the relaxing body undertones from myrcene make it versatile enough for early evening wind-down as well.

0332f6000648.lineage: Purple Thai x Undisclosed Hybrid (Campfire Cannabis); Purple Thai itself is a classic sativa-dominant landrace cross of Thai stick genetics and Purple varieties, likely carrying Afghani influence through the purple-expressing parent
0332f6000648.therapeutic: Stress relief, depression, fatigue, mild anxiety, appetite stimulation, focus disorders, mood elevation
0332f6000648.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia in sensitive users or at higher doses, potential anxiousness due to sativa-forward profile, overconsumption may cause racing thoughts
0332f6000648.aroma: Bangkok Purple opens with a vibrant burst of sun-ripened blueberry and tropical citrus, layered over a delicate floral undercurrent of lavender and jasmine. As the bouquet settles, warm hints of spice and earthy resin emerge, giving it an exotic, Southeast Asian-inspired complexity.
0332f6000648.misc: Produced by Campfire Cannabis, Bangkok Purple is a sativa-leaning hybrid with a moderate THC content of 16.9%, making it approachable for intermediate consumers while still delivering a meaningful effect. Buds are expected to display deep purple and forest green hues with amber trichomes, consistent with its Purple Thai heritage and the linalool-rich terpene profile that reinforces the lavender and floral notes. Best enjoyed during morning or early afternoon sessions when its energetic, focusing, and motivating qualities can be fully leveraged — particularly well-suited for creative work, social activity, or outdoor adventures.

e0b832e65b4f.lineage: F1 Durban Poison x TK41 (Campfire Cannabis); TK41 is believed to be a Trainwreck-derived cultivar, making this a cross of the classic South African sativa landrace Durban Poison with a potent indica-leaning Trainwreck phenotype
e0b832e65b4f.therapeutic: Stress relief, mild depression, fatigue, mood elevation, creative blocks, mild anxiety, appetite stimulation
e0b832e65b4f.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia at higher doses, possible restlessness or racing thoughts in sativa-sensitive users despite indica classification
e0b832e65b4f.aroma: A bright, complex bouquet opens with zesty citrus and sweet tropical fruit, reminiscent of Durban Poison's signature anise-tinged freshness, undercut by a sharp diesel note and warm spiced vanilla that lingers on the exhale. The linalool and pinene weave in a subtle floral-herbal cleanliness that keeps the profile from feeling heavy.
e0b832e65b4f.misc: Poison Gushers is a Campfire Cannabis house cultivar blending the legendary energetic clarity of Durban Poison with the resinous body of TK41, yielding an atypically uplifting indica-dominant hybrid sitting at a moderate 16.6% THC — approachable for intermediate consumers. Buds typically display forest-green coloration with amber trichomes and a sticky, resinous texture consistent with Trainwreck lineage. Best suited for daytime or early afternoon use given its energetic and creative effects profile; not recommended as a nighttime sleep aid despite its indica classification.

74b7692498fa.lineage: GG4 (Gorilla Glue #4) x Jokerz #31 — GG4 bred by GG Strains LLC (Joesy Whales x Lone Watcher); Jokerz #31 is a Compound Genetics creation (White Runtz x Jet Fuel Gelato)
74b7692498fa.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety reduction, mild pain management, depression, fatigue, social anxiety, appetite stimulation
74b7692498fa.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia at higher doses, potential dizziness for novice consumers, possible couch-lock with heavy consumption despite hybrid classification
74b7692498fa.aroma: Glue 31 opens with a pungent wave of fuel and diesel inherited from its GG4 parent, quickly layered with sweet fruity and floral notes from Jokerz #31's Runtz heritage. Underneath, earthy pine and subtle nutty undertones round out a complex, dank bouquet that lingers on the senses.
74b7692498fa.misc: At 22.3% THC, Glue 31 sits in a moderately potent range well-suited for intermediate consumers, offering a balanced hybrid experience that leans euphoric and social rather than sedative, making it ideal for late afternoon or early evening use. The terpene profile — led by caryophyllene for body relaxation, terpinolene for uplifting cerebral energy, and linalool for stress relief — complements the effects profile cohesively. Buds typically display dense, resin-heavy structure characteristic of GG4, with a frosty trichome coat and occasional purple hues courtesy of the Jokerz #31 lineage.

dd494fcaec3c.lineage: Edible product — exact strain genetics not specified; 'Sour Blueberry' likely draws inspiration from Sour Diesel x Blueberry (DJ Short's Blueberry) hybrid flavor profiles used in formulation
dd494fcaec3c.therapeutic: Stress relief, mild to moderate pain management, anxiety reduction, appetite stimulation, mood elevation, insomnia support at higher doses
dd494fcaec3c.negative: Overconsumption risk due to high potency concentrate (94.2% THC distillate); possible dry mouth, paranoia, dizziness, anxiety, or couch-lock — especially for new or low-tolerance users; delayed onset (30–120 min) increases accidental overconsumption risk
dd494fcaec3c.aroma: As an edible, expect a candy-forward scent blending sweet ripe blueberry with a tangy sour citrus bite. The flavor profile is likely dominated by artificial or natural fruit flavoring designed to mimic a blueberry sour candy experience.
dd494fcaec3c.misc: Each piece contains 10mg THC — a standard single serving recommended for most adults; beginners should start with 2.5–5mg (half or quarter piece). The 94.2% THC figure refers to the distillate concentrate used in formulation, not the per-piece dose. Wait at least 90 minutes before re-dosing to accurately assess effects. Grasslandz is a cannabis brand focused on accessible, consistent dosing in edible form.

51e2e4ac77bd.lineage: Edible product — no specific strain lineage available. Mango Fuego is a branded gummy by Munchies De Mayo, formulated with cannabis distillate or extract; genetic origin of source cannabis is undisclosed. Note: THC percentage listed (183.6%) appears to be a data entry error — actual dosing is 10mg THC per piece, 200mg THC per package (20 pieces).
51e2e4ac77bd.therapeutic: Mild stress relief, mood elevation, appetite stimulation, minor pain relief, social anxiety reduction
51e2e4ac77bd.negative: Delayed onset (30–90 minutes) may lead to overconsumption — start with one piece and wait; dry mouth, increased appetite, possible anxiety or paranoia at higher doses, drowsiness, impaired coordination
51e2e4ac77bd.aroma: These gummies deliver a vibrant burst of sun-ripened tropical mango layered with a subtle fiery chili-lime kick. The sweetness is bright and juicy with a warm, spiced finish that lingers on the palate.
51e2e4ac77bd.misc: Dosed at 10mg THC per gummy, Mango Fuego is suitable for beginner to intermediate consumers — beginners should start with half a piece (5mg) and wait at least 90 minutes before redosing. The spicy mango flavor profile suggests a Tajín or chili-mango inspiration, making it a festive, palatable option for social settings. Always store away from children and consume responsibly in a safe environment.

dad815e9d863.lineage: Purple Panty Dropper x Blueberry (Humboldt Seed Organization, popularized by Humboldt Seed Co.; Purple Panty Dropper itself is a cross of Mendocino Purps x Gdp-influenced genetics, while Blueberry traces back to DJ Short's legendary Blueberry — Afghani x Thai x Purple Thai)
dad815e9d863.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety reduction, mild pain management, appetite stimulation, insomnia (evening use), depression, muscle tension
dad815e9d863.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild dizziness at higher doses, potential couch-lock in sensitive users, mild paranoia in low-tolerance consumers due to THC content
dad815e9d863.aroma: A warm, bakery-fresh wave of sweet blueberries and vanilla cream rises first, underscored by a subtle earthiness and a faint herbal muskiness that grounds the sweetness like a buttered muffin fresh from the oven.
dad815e9d863.misc: Blueberry Muffin was bred and popularized by Humboldt Seed Organization and has gained significant recognition for its remarkably dessert-accurate flavor profile — rare among cannabis strains. At 17.9% THC this is a moderate-to-mid strength indica-leaning hybrid, ideal for evening or late-afternoon use when relaxation is the goal. Buds typically display deep forest greens with purple hues, dense trichome coverage, and vivid orange pistils; the Myrcene-forward terpene profile amplifies its sedating, body-relaxing qualities, making it particularly well-suited for unwinding after a long day.

1072e363f968.lineage: Biscotti x Sour Dubb x Chocolate Diesel (Seed Junky Genetics, popularized by Doja Exclusive / Wizards of the Coast collaboration)
1072e363f968.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety reduction, depression, appetite stimulation, mild pain management, creative blocks, fatigue
1072e363f968.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia at high doses, potential couch-lock with heavy consumption, dizziness in low-tolerance users
1072e363f968.aroma: Permanent Marker hits the nose with a bold, fuel-forward rush of sharp diesel and gasoline that quickly opens up into sweet candy and floral undertones, reminiscent of a pungent, inky sweetness. A soapy, almost perfume-like quality lingers beneath the surface, complemented by subtle citrus brightness that keeps the profile complex and captivating.
1072e363f968.misc: Permanent Marker is a highly sought-after cultivar originally developed within the Seed Junky Genetics and Doja Exclusive circles, gaining significant hype on the West Coast cannabis scene for its striking bag appeal — typically presenting dense, chunky buds with deep purple hues, vivid orange pistils, and a heavy blanket of trichomes. At 22.5% THC this batch sits within a typical range of 22–30%+ seen across premium cuts, making it best suited for late-evening or nighttime use given its indica-leaning hybrid profile. Consumers new to this strain should start low, as its euphoric and creative onset can transition into deep relaxation and sedation, and it has earned a loyal following among connoisseurs who prize its unique blend of gassy, sweet, and soapy terpene complexity.

83b9bf160cc6.lineage: Skunk #1 x Afghani Landrace Indica (Original breeder credited to Cecil C., popularized and renamed by Snoop Dogg; Skunk #1 itself is a tri-hybrid of Acapulco Gold x Colombian Gold x Afghani)
83b9bf160cc6.therapeutic: Depression, fatigue, stress, ADHD, anxiety (low doses), mood disorders, chronic fatigue syndrome, lack of focus
83b9bf160cc6.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, heightened anxiety or paranoia at high doses, racing thoughts, increased heart rate — not recommended for those prone to anxiety or panic disorders due to its energetic sativa-leaning profile; high THC content (81.7% in this vape) warrants cautious dosing
83b9bf160cc6.aroma: Green Crack bursts with a sharp, tropical citrus and mango-forward fragrance layered over a sweet, tangy undercurrent of ripe fruit and fresh-cut pine. Earthy, slightly skunky base notes emerge on the exhale, grounding the otherwise bright and zesty aromatic profile.
83b9bf160cc6.misc: Originally named 'Cush' by its breeder Cecil C., the strain was rebranded 'Green Crack' by Snoop Dogg — a name that references its intensely energizing, almost stimulant-like effects. Typical flower THC ranges land between 15–25%, making this 81.7% Stargaze vape concentrate significantly more potent and ideal for experienced consumers only. Best consumed in the morning or early afternoon for productive, creative tasks; the Myrcene and Caryophyllene in the terpene profile help soften the sharp sativa edge while Limonene and Pinene amplify mood elevation and mental clarity.

68387bbac1ce.lineage: Jack Herer x Timewreck (Jacked Up) coated in Super Boof kief [Purple Panty Dropper x Blueberry (Super Boof)]; Jack Herer itself descends from Haze x (Northern Lights #5 x Shiva Skunk), Timewreck from Trainwreck x TGA Subcool genetics, and Purple Panty Dropper from Mendocino Purps x GDP lineage
68387bbac1ce.therapeutic: Stress relief, depression, fatigue, mood elevation, mild pain management, social anxiety, creative blocks, low appetite
68387bbac1ce.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia or racing thoughts at high doses, possible anxiety in THC-sensitive users, dizziness; the kief coating significantly elevates potency so novice consumers should use caution
68387bbac1ce.aroma: A complex and inviting bouquet of sweet blueberry and ripe citrus zest rides on a foundation of earthy pine and peppery spice, a hallmark of the Jack Herer heritage meeting the fruity funk of Super Boof. As it burns, warm woody undertones and a sugary berry sweetness from the kief coating bloom into a smooth, fragrant exhale.
68387bbac1ce.misc: This is a Lakeside Canna house creation pairing the energizing, cerebral Sativa-leaning Jacked Up flower with a lavish coating of Super Boof kief, pushing estimated THC levels well above the base flower — likely landing in the 28–35%+ range when accounting for the kief layer. Jacked Up delivers the classic uplifting, focus-forward Jack Herer experience while Super Boof kief adds a euphoric, body-relaxing depth and a burst of sweet berry complexity. Best consumed during daytime or early evening social settings; ideal for creative projects, outdoor activities, or conversations — not recommended as a first experience for new cannabis consumers due to the concentrated kief coating.

83fa406599ab.lineage: Indiana Bubblegum x Unknown Indica (Lakeside Canna / lineage tracing back to original Bubblegum genetics developed in Indiana in the 1970s-80s, later popularized by TH Seeds in Amsterdam)
83fa406599ab.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety reduction, mild pain management, appetite stimulation, mood elevation, insomnia (evening use)
83fa406599ab.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, possible couch-lock at higher doses, mild dizziness for low-tolerance users, overconsumption may increase anxiety in sensitive individuals
83fa406599ab.aroma: A nose full of sweet, candy-forward bubblegum and ripe mixed berries greets you immediately, layered beneath with soft floral top notes and a smooth, almost creamy vanilla undertone. The kief coating amplifies the terpene profile, releasing a noticeably resinous, earthy sweetness that lingers pleasantly in the air.
83fa406599ab.misc: Bubblegum is a classic strain with roots traced back to Indiana breeders before being refined in the Netherlands, known for its distinctively sweet, confection-like profile and balanced euphoric-yet-relaxing effects; the added kief coating on this pre-roll significantly elevates potency, making it best suited for experienced consumers or evening use. Uncoated Bubblegum typically tests between 17-24% THC, but the kief coating on this Lakeside Canna product likely pushes effective potency considerably higher — consume slowly and pace yourself. Best enjoyed in a relaxed evening setting when creativity and unwinding are the goal, and particularly well-suited for users managing stress, low mood, or mild chronic discomfort.

497cc3e8e881.lineage: Cherry Kush x (Lemon Tree Papaya x GMO) x FroDo — a complex multi-cross hybrid; Cherry Kush is a classic OG Kush x Hindu Kush descendant, Lemon Tree Papaya blends citrus-forward Lemon Tree genetics with tropical Papaya, GMO (also known as Garlic Cookies) is a Chemdawg x Girl Scout Cookies cross, and FroDo contributes additional hybrid depth; Northpark (cultivated batch by Northpark)
497cc3e8e881.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety management, mild pain relief, mood elevation, mental fatigue, creative blocks, mild depression, appetite stimulation
497cc3e8e881.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia at higher doses, possible overconsumption risk for low-tolerance users given sativa lean may amplify anxiety, slight dizziness in sensitive individuals
497cc3e8e881.aroma: This batch opens with a sharp, zesty lemon and citrus peel burst undercut by a funky, garlicky skunk note inherited from its GMO parentage — grounding the bright top notes with an earthy, herbal depth. As it settles, soft pine resin and a peppery spice emerge, creating a layered, almost savory-citrus olfactory profile reminiscent of a well-seasoned herb garden.
497cc3e8e881.misc: Zesty Parm is a boutique multi-cross hybrid that skews indica-dominant in most phenotypes (roughly 60/40), but this Northpark batch presents as a sativa-leaning expression with a moderate THC content of 18.8%, making it approachable for intermediate consumers. Buds are likely dense with a light green to olive hue, amber trichomes, and orange pistils reflecting its Kush and Cookies heritage. Best suited for daytime to early evening use — ideal for creative tasks, social settings, or unwinding without full sedation; new users should start with 1-2 puffs and assess tolerance before redosing.

fcef6afb069c.lineage: Blueberry (DJ Short) x Haze (Sacred Seeds / Nevil's Haze lineage) — popularized by DJ Short and widely distributed through Santa Cruz-area breeders
fcef6afb069c.therapeutic: Depression, anxiety, mild pain, fatigue, stress, ADHD, creative blocks, mood disorders
fcef6afb069c.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia or anxiety at higher doses, occasional headache, may feel overstimulating for THC-sensitive users
fcef6afb069c.aroma: A sweet, sun-ripened blueberry sweetness leads the nose, layered with earthy herbal undertones and a bright, slightly piney freshness reminiscent of a berry patch in a forest clearing.
fcef6afb069c.misc: Blue Dream is one of the most iconic and commercially successful hybrids in the United States, dominating dispensary shelves throughout the 2010s and earning widespread recognition for its balanced, approachable high. At 13.4% THC this particular batch skews on the lighter, more approachable end of the typical 17–24% range commonly seen, making it well-suited for daytime use, beginners, or microdosers seeking gentle euphoria without heavy sedation. The Myrcene-forward terpene profile adds a grounding body ease to what is otherwise a cerebrally energizing sativa-leaning experience, and the 0.33g pre-roll format is ideal for a measured, functional session.

130803345c65.therapeutic: Stress relief, mild anxiety, depression, fatigue, mood elevation, mild pain management
130803345c65.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia at higher doses, possible dizziness in low-tolerance users
130803345c65.aroma: A lush, fruit-forward bouquet of ripe mixed berries and floral sweetness opens up first, followed by a soft, earthy herbal undertone reminiscent of chamomile or green tea with a faint musky depth courtesy of Myrcene and Farnesene.
130803345c65.misc: Medusa, also known as 'The Nirvana Strain,' was developed by Nirvana Seeds and is rooted in the classic Misty hybrid, itself a cross of White Widow and Shiva Shanti II. Typical THC expression runs moderate at 12–18%, making this dizgo 2-pack at 12.6% a smooth, accessible entry point ideal for daytime or early evening use without heavy sedation. The evenly balanced hybrid profile, accented by Ocimene's sweet herbaceousness and Caryophyllene's mild spice, makes it well-suited for social settings or creative relaxation, particularly appealing to consumers seeking euphoria and calm without couch-lock.

67cddfb4cd43.lineage: Atlas Star × Cotton Candy (Dizgo / proprietary hybrid cross; Cotton Candy lineage traces to Power Plant × Haze via Nirvana Seeds)
67cddfb4cd43.therapeutic: Insomnia, anxiety, chronic stress, mild pain relief, muscle tension, mood elevation
67cddfb4cd43.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, potential grogginess or next-day sedation at higher doses, mild paranoia in THC-sensitive users, couch-lock with heavy consumption
67cddfb4cd43.aroma: A sweet, candy-forward bouquet greets the nose first — think spun sugar and ripe citrus zest — followed by a warm, doughy cookie undertone with subtle earthy musk courtesy of the myrcene base. The finish lingers with a light floral-tropical sweetness that keeps the profile approachable and dessert-like.
67cddfb4cd43.misc: Top Gun is a Dizgo-branded indica-leaning hybrid pre-roll cross combining the relaxing, star-powered Atlas Star with the famously sweet Cotton Candy strain, resulting in a mellow yet gently focused experience suited for evening and late-night use. At 17% THC with minimal CBD (0.2%), this is a moderate-potency option ideal for intermediate consumers seeking wind-down relief without full sedation right away. The terpene trio of Myrcene, Limonene, and Caryophyllene synergizes to produce calming, anti-anxiety, and anti-inflammatory effects — making this 2-pack a solid choice for stress relief after work or as a sleep-prep ritual.

430d15195b26.lineage: Grape Pie x Cookies and Cream (Grape Pie = Cherry Pie x Grape Stomper; Cookies and Cream = Starfighter x GSC phenotype, bred by Exotic Genetix)
430d15195b26.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety management, mild depression, appetite stimulation, creative blocks, social anxiety, mild pain and muscle tension
430d15195b26.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, possible mild paranoia or racing thoughts in THC-sensitive users, light couch-lock as effects deepen, overconsumption may increase anxiety
430d15195b26.aroma: A lush, dessert-forward bouquet opens with ripe Concord grape and sweet cherry, quickly giving way to a thick vanilla cream undertone reminiscent of a fruit tart fresh from the oven. Subtle earthy spice and a faint floral lift from linalool round out the profile, keeping it complex without losing its indulgent sweetness.
430d15195b26.misc: Grapes N Cream is produced by Campfire Cannabis and sits at approximately 20–23% THC, making it a moderately potent hybrid well-suited to intermediate consumers. Buds present as oversized, neon-green nuggets with amber undertones, dense orange pistils, and a heavy frost of golden trichomes that reflect its rich terpene load. Best consumed in the late afternoon or early evening when its arc from focused creativity to full-body calm aligns naturally with winding down social or creative sessions before rest.

99d83976ed16.lineage: African Orange x Runtz (Runtz itself being a cross of Zkittlez x Gelato by Cookies Fam); Orange Runtz as presented by Campfire Cannabis draws on African landrace sativa genetics crossed with the Cookies-lineage hybrid Runtz
99d83976ed16.therapeutic: Stress relief, depression, fatigue, mood disorders, mild anxiety, lack of focus, social anxiety, low-grade pain and tension
99d83976ed16.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia or racing thoughts at higher doses, possible dizziness in THC-sensitive users; not ideal for those prone to anxiety due to sativa-dominant energetic onset
99d83976ed16.aroma: Bursting with sweet, candy-like orange peel and ripe citrus zest upfront, followed by a soft tropical undercurrent of banana and fresh fruit, and rounded out by a subtle sour tang that keeps the nose lively and bright
99d83976ed16.misc: Produced by Campfire Cannabis, this batch comes in at a moderate 16.8% THC, making it accessible for intermediate consumers while still delivering clear, functional effects. Dense dark olive-green buds with purple undertones, vivid orange pistils, and a heavy trichome frost give it strong visual appeal. Best enjoyed during daytime or early evening social settings — ideal for creative work, outdoor activities, or gatherings where focus and upbeat energy are desired.

6758c34ef497.lineage: Purple Panty Dropper x Blueberry (Humboldt Seed Organization, popularized by Humboldt Seed Co.; Purple Panty Dropper itself descends from Mendocino Purps x GDP lineage, while Blueberry traces back to DJ Short's classic Blueberry — Afghani x Thai x Purple Thai)
6758c34ef497.therapeutic: Stress relief, mild anxiety reduction, appetite stimulation, mild chronic pain, insomnia (onset), muscle tension, mood elevation
6758c34ef497.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild dizziness at higher doses, potential couch-lock with extended use, may cause grogginess — newcomers should approach the indica-dominant effects cautiously
6758c34ef497.aroma: A warm, bakery-fresh burst of ripe blueberries layered over creamy vanilla and buttery pastry dough, with an earthy herbal undertone that grounds the sweetness and hints at the strain's deep purple Afghani roots.
6758c34ef497.misc: Blueberry Muffin was originally developed and popularized by Humboldt Seed Organization and is recognized as a award-winning cultivar celebrated for its true-to-name dessert terpene profile. At 17.9% THC this is a moderate-to-mid-range potency expression, making it approachable for intermediate consumers while still delivering a relaxed, euphoric body effect ideal for evening or late-afternoon use. Buds typically exhibit deep purple and forest-green hues with a frosty trichome coating and bright orange pistils, reflecting its rich Blueberry and Purps ancestry.

67d2a8b001d3.lineage: Fro'Do x Alaskan Yeti, then crossed with LilMissHS (Avió proprietary hybrid blend; exact breeders of parent strains not widely documented in public databases)
67d2a8b001d3.therapeutic: Stress relief, mild anxiety reduction, mood elevation, fatigue, mild pain management, focus support
67d2a8b001d3.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, possible mild paranoia or racing thoughts in sensitive users, slight dizziness at higher doses due to sativa-leaning genetics
67d2a8b001d3.aroma: A bright, resinous blend of tropical fruit and fresh pine needles greets the nose first, followed by a subtle warm spice on the backend reminiscent of cardamom or pepper. The myrcene base adds an earthy, slightly musky depth that grounds the otherwise lively top notes.
67d2a8b001d3.misc: Frodo Squeeze is an Avió house hybrid likely developed to balance the earthy, sedative qualities of Alaskan Yeti with the fruity, uplifting character of Fro'Do and the reportedly zesty, balanced profile of LilMissHS. At 17.1% THC and 0.3% CBD, this is a moderate-potency option well-suited for daytime to early evening use, offering calm focus without heavy sedation. Consumers new to cannabis or those sensitive to THC should start slowly, as terpinene can amplify cerebral effects alongside the limonene-driven mood lift.

2f31fd50f830.lineage: Cherry Kush x (Lemon Tree Papaya x GMO) x Fro'Do (Avió)
2f31fd50f830.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety management, mild pain, mood elevation, mental fatigue
2f31fd50f830.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia at higher doses, slight dizziness for low-tolerance users
2f31fd50f830.aroma: A pungent, zesty burst of fresh lemon citrus layered over dank, garlicky earthiness with subtle herbal pine notes lingering in the background — reminiscent of a well-seasoned kitchen with a skunky, funky depth that keeps it grounded and complex.
2f31fd50f830.misc: This sativa-leaning hybrid from Avió draws on a complex cross blending the sweet-tart cherry and kushy depth of Cherry Kush, the citrus-forward tropical funk of Lemon Tree Papaya, the notoriously gassy and savory GMO, and the frosty Fro'Do for added resin and balance. At 17.2% THC it sits in a moderate-to-mid potency range, making it approachable for intermediate consumers seeking functional daytime or early evening use without overwhelming sedation. The myrcene-limonene-caryophyllene terpene profile supports the calming-yet-focused effect profile, making it well-suited for creative tasks, social settings, or unwinding after work.

5c33b524689a.lineage: Purple OG Kush x Bubba Kush (Campfire Cannabis)
5c33b524689a.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety management, mild depression, fatigue, creative blocks, mild pain and tension, mood elevation
5c33b524689a.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia at higher doses, possible dizziness for low-tolerance users, overconsumption may tip sativa-leaning energy into anxious headspace
5c33b524689a.aroma: A rich, dessert-like bouquet opens with sweet creamy vanilla and ripe grape, underscored by earthy kush musk inherited from its OG and Bubba parentage. Bright lemon citrus lifts the top notes while floral spice and a subtle herbal warmth from linalool and ocimene add layers of aromatic complexity.
5c33b524689a.misc: Purple Milk is a sativa-leaning hybrid born from two iconic kush lineages — Purple OG Kush and Bubba Kush — combining the colorful bag appeal and grape sweetness of the former with the dense, resinous structure and calming body depth of the latter. At 16.8% THC, this is an approachable mid-potency option well suited for daytime to early evening use, particularly for creative sessions, social activities, or unwinding without full sedation. Dense emerald buds with deep purple foliage, vivid orange pistils, and a heavy trichome blanket make this a visually striking pre-roll, ideal for consumers seeking a smooth, gradually building experience that balances mental lift with physical ease.

300fd57c06bd.lineage: Alien Cookies x Kush Mints #11 (Cap Junky originally bred by Capulator, popularized through Masonic Seeds; Alien Cookies derives from Alien Dawg x Girl Scout Cookies, while Kush Mints #11 is Animal Mints x Bubba Kush)
300fd57c06bd.therapeutic: Stress relief, mild anxiety reduction, muscle tension, mood elevation, fatigue, mild pain management, appetite stimulation
300fd57c06bd.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, possible dizziness or mild paranoia at higher doses, may cause couch-lock in sensitive users despite hybrid classification
300fd57c06bd.aroma: Cap Junky opens with a sharp, fuel-forward diesel blast layered over cool menthol and fresh pine, quickly giving way to creamy sweet vanilla-cookie undertones and a whisper of floral lavender — a complex, almost contradictory combination that rewards a slow inhale.
300fd57c06bd.misc: Cap Junky is a highly regarded craft cultivar originally developed by the breeder Capulator, known for producing dense, frosty buds with deep green and purple hues blanketed in trichomes. At 16.3% THC this is a moderately potent expression — approachable for intermediate consumers but still effective for seasoned users seeking a balanced hybrid experience. Best suited for late afternoon or early evening use when relaxation and a social, giggly mood are welcome without full sedation; the rich terpene profile including myrcene, linalool, and limonene reinforces its calming yet uplifting character.

5d8f6c97b9ab.lineage: Las Vegas Lemon Skunk x Member Berry (Redwood County Weed Co); Las Vegas Lemon Skunk is derived from Las Vegas Skunk x Lemon Skunk (DNA Genetics), while Member Berry is a cross of Skunkberry x Mandarin Sunset (Ethos Genetics)
5d8f6c97b9ab.therapeutic: Stress relief, mild anxiety reduction, mood elevation, mild pain management, fatigue, appetite stimulation
5d8f6c97b9ab.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia or anxiousness in THC-sensitive users, possible dizziness at higher consumption; low THC percentage makes overconsumption less likely but caution still advised for novice users
5d8f6c97b9ab.aroma: A bright and inviting blend of zesty lemon citrus and sweet ripe berries greets the nose upfront, carried on a subtle piney, earthy backbone. A faint skunky undercurrent adds depth and complexity without overpowering the fresh, candy-like top notes.
5d8f6c97b9ab.misc: Early Lemon Berry is a balanced hybrid leaning slightly toward sativa-dominant effects, bred to highlight a bright citrus-berry terpene profile anchored by pinene's mental clarity, caryophyllene's mild body relaxation, and humulene's subtle earthy grounding. At 13.6% THC, this is an approachable, sessionable strain well-suited for daytime or early evening use, making it ideal for social settings, creative activities, or unwinding without heavy sedation. Buds typically present with light green hues, amber pistils, and a modest trichome coating consistent with its moderate potency profile.

39b8db68a598.lineage: F1 Durban Poison x TK41 (Campfire Cannabis / lineage suggesting connection to Exotic Genetix or similar west-coast hybrid programs; TK41 is a Trop Karma phenotype with GMO/Chemdawg ancestry crossed into the Durban Poison sativa base)
39b8db68a598.therapeutic: Stress relief, mild anxiety, fatigue, mood elevation, mild depression, creative blocks, social anxiety
39b8db68a598.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia at higher doses, possible lightheadedness for low-tolerance users; the indica-lean may cause drowsiness in sensitive consumers despite the energetic effect profile
39b8db68a598.aroma: Opens with a bold candy-forward sweetness layered over ripe tropical fruit and bright citrus zest, with a lightly gassy, fuel-tinged undercurrent that grounds the sweetness and gives it an exotic, complex edge. Subtle earthy spice and faint vanilla round out the nose on the exhale.
39b8db68a598.misc: Poison Gushers sits in a moderate THC range (typically 16–22%) making it approachable for intermediate consumers while still delivering meaningful effects; the pre-roll format from Campfire Cannabis suggests a focus on accessibility and consistent terpene expression. Buds are typically dense with an indica structure, showcasing amber pistils and a frosty trichome coating reflective of its Chemdawg-adjacent TK41 parentage. Best suited for afternoon or early evening use when creativity and relaxed focus are desired without full sedation.

3c5d10cfef28.lineage: Indiana Bubblegum x Unknown Indica (Lakeside Canna); Indiana Bubblegum itself traces back to the original Bubblegum strain developed in Indiana in the 1970s-80s, later popularized by TH Seeds as a Indica-leaning hybrid with roots in American landrace and unknown hybrid genetics
3c5d10cfef28.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety reduction, mild chronic pain, depression, appetite stimulation, insomnia (with higher doses or indica expression)
3c5d10cfef28.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, potential dizziness or mild paranoia at elevated THC levels especially with kief coating, couch-lock if consumed in large quantities, not recommended for low-tolerance users due to enhanced potency from kief
3c5d10cfef28.aroma: A lusciously sweet and candy-forward nose bursts with ripe berry and classic bubblegum notes, underscored by soft floral undertones and a creamy, almost dessert-like finish that lingers pleasantly in the air
3c5d10cfef28.misc: This kief-coated pre-roll from Lakeside Canna pushes effective THC well beyond the base 25.5%, making it a high-potency product best suited for experienced consumers. The bubblegum lineage is known for producing dense, frosty buds with pastel green hues and a heavy trichome coating, making it a natural candidate for kief enhancement. Best enjoyed in the evening or during relaxed creative sessions, this is a social-yet-sedating hybrid ideal for unwinding after a long day.

2778a3a16ea4.lineage: Blueberry (DJ Short) x Haze (Nevil's Haze / Original Haze lineage) — popularized by Bay Area breeder DJ Short and later Santa Cruz Haze phenotypes; widely bred and distributed across the West Coast market
2778a3a16ea4.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety, mild depression, fatigue, lack of focus, creative blocks, mild pain, headaches
2778a3a16ea4.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia or anxiety at higher doses, occasional dizziness — use caution if sensitive to sativa-dominant effects
2778a3a16ea4.aroma: A sweet, sun-ripened blueberry bouquet greets the nose first, layered beneath with earthy, piney undertones and a light herbal musk that hints at its Haze heritage. The overall profile is bright and inviting, with a subtle vanilla-like sweetness that lingers on the exhale.
2778a3a16ea4.misc: Blue Dream is one of the most iconic and commercially successful strains in the U.S., having dominated California dispensaries for over a decade and earning widespread recognition for its approachable, balanced effects. At 15.9% THC this batch sits on the moderate end of Blue Dream's typical 17–24% range, making it well-suited for daytime use, social settings, or creative work without overwhelming novice consumers. The myrcene-forward terpene profile softens the sativa edge with relaxing body undertones, while pinene supports mental clarity and caryophyllene adds a mild anti-inflammatory benefit.

c3ac2c3375ab.lineage: Jacked Up (Jack Herer x Timewreck) coated in Super Boof kief (Purple Panty Dropper x Black Cherry Gelato; noting store lists Purple Panty Dropper x Blueberry as their Super Boof variation) — a complex sativa-leaning hybrid cross blending NL5/Haze/Shiva Skunk ancestry from Jack Herer, Trainwreck genetics from Timewreck, and fruity indica depth from the Super Boof kief layer
c3ac2c3375ab.therapeutic: Stress relief, depression, fatigue, mood elevation, mild pain management, focus and creativity support, social anxiety
c3ac2c3375ab.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, potential anxiety or paranoia at high doses due to elevated THC and sativa dominance, mild headache possible, not recommended for novice users or those sensitive to THC
c3ac2c3375ab.aroma: A vibrant and complex bouquet opens with bright citrus zest and fresh berries, layered over a dank, earthy musk from the myrcene-heavy base. Sweet blueberry and grape notes from the Super Boof kief weave through a spicy, piney backbone inherited from the Jack Herer lineage, finishing with a subtle woody warmth.
c3ac2c3375ab.misc: This keif-coated pre-roll is a premium format product from Lakeside Canna, combining the energetic, cerebral buzz of Jacked Up with the flavorful, resin-rich enhancement of Super Boof kief — pushing THC to a potent 24.9%, well above typical flower averages. The kief coating adds visible trichome density and a noticeable boost in both potency and terpene expression, making this best suited for experienced consumers. Ideal for daytime or early evening use — particularly well-suited for creative projects, social gatherings, or outdoor activities where uplifted energy and mental engagement are desired.

5cc9edab9f48.lineage: Atlas Star × Cotton Candy (Dizgo / independent hybrid cross; Cotton Candy likely descends from Power Plant × Haze lineage, while Atlas Star contributes indica-dominant body effects)
5cc9edab9f48.therapeutic: Insomnia, anxiety, chronic stress, mild pain relief, muscle tension, appetite stimulation
5cc9edab9f48.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, potential couch-lock at higher doses, mild paranoia in THC-sensitive users, drowsiness may impair productivity
5cc9edab9f48.aroma: A sweet, candy-forward bouquet opens with bright citrus zest and ripe tropical fruit courtesy of Limonene, giving way to a warm, doughy cookie base grounded by earthy Myrcene and a subtle spiced pepper finish from Caryophyllene. The overall scent profile is inviting and dessert-like, reminiscent of a citrus-glazed sugar cookie.
5cc9edab9f48.misc: Top Gun by Dizgo is a consumer-friendly indica-leaning hybrid sitting at a moderate 17% THC, making it accessible for intermediate users while still delivering meaningful sedative and relaxing effects — best reserved for late evening or nighttime use. The Cotton Candy heritage lends the sweet, candy-like flavor profile while Atlas Star anchors the body-heavy, unbothered sensation. At 0.2% CBD, the entourage effect is minimal but may contribute slightly to the calming, stress-relieving qualities; new users should start with half a pre-roll given the sleepy, sedating effect profile.

643a5fc06fa2.therapeutic: Stress relief, mild anxiety, depression, fatigue, mood elevation, mild pain management
643a5fc06fa2.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia at higher doses, possible dizziness in low-tolerance users
643a5fc06fa2.aroma: A soft and inviting bouquet of fresh berries and sweet floral notes opens the senses, underscored by a subtle earthy muskiness from myrcene and a faint spicy herbaceous quality courtesy of caryophyllene, with ocimene lending a light, almost tea-like sweetness that lingers on the exhale.
643a5fc06fa2.misc: Medusa is a creation from Nirvana Seeds, a well-established Dutch seed bank, bred as a phenotype-forward hybrid of their beloved Misty strain crossed with an undisclosed sativa, resulting in what the breeder describes as a near-perfect 50/50 balance of indica and sativa effects. At 12.6% THC this is a approachable, moderate-potency offering well-suited for daytime-to-evening use, making it ideal for newer consumers or those seeking functional relaxation without heavy sedation. Buds are typically dense and resinous with hues of deep green and occasional purple tones, and the balanced terpene profile of myrcene, caryophyllene, ocimene, and farnesene contributes to its smooth, fruity smoke and well-rounded mind-body effect.

bc4c058f8526.lineage: Likely a proprietary or house hybrid cross; possibly derived from citrus-forward and OG-influenced genetics such as a Lemon or Orange-based cultivar crossed with an earthy Kush or Diesel variety — exact breeder and parentage unconfirmed, developed or curated by Campfire Cannabis
bc4c058f8526.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety management, mild depression, mental fatigue, creative blocks, mild pain relief, mood elevation
bc4c058f8526.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia in sensitive users at higher doses, occasional mild headache, may cause restlessness in those sensitive to sativa-leaning hybrids
bc4c058f8526.aroma: The nose opens with a vivid burst of fresh citrus — bright orange peel and zesty lemon — riding on a current of piney freshness and light floral ocimene sweetness. Beneath the top notes, earthy herbal undertones and a faint diesel spice add depth and complexity to the overall bouquet.
bc4c058f8526.misc: Fight Club is a sativa-leaning hybrid at 21.8% THC, making it a moderately potent option well-suited for intermediate to experienced consumers. The dense forest-green buds with purple accents and heavy trichome coverage suggest a well-cultivated phenotype with strong resin production. Best enjoyed during morning to early evening hours when creative focus and uplifted social energy are desired without sacrificing functional clarity.

223a4c4c39a3.lineage: Snowman x The Y (Cookies Fam & Powerzzzup Genetics) — Note: The store-listed lineage of Snowman x Cherry Pie x Girl Scout Cookies reflects the broader Cookies family tree; the commercially recognized Gary Payton was developed by Cookies Fam in collaboration with Powerzzzup Genetics, named after NBA Hall of Famer Gary Payton
223a4c4c39a3.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety management, mild depression, fatigue, low-grade pain, mood elevation, focus support
223a4c4c39a3.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, occasional mild paranoia or anxiety at higher doses, dizziness in low-tolerance users — the 17.5% THC is approachable but newer consumers should start slow
223a4c4c39a3.aroma: The nose opens with a bold fuel-forward punch layered over ripe sweet cherries and dark berries, reminiscent of a dessert left near a gas station — pungent, complex, and oddly inviting. Deeper inhalation reveals subtle earthy spice and a faint floral whisper, likely driven by the linalool and bisabolol terpenes rounding out the diesel backbone.
223a4c4c39a3.misc: Gary Payton gained significant recognition after winning multiple cannabis cups and becoming a flagship strain in the Cookies Fam catalog, known for its consistent quality and balanced hybrid character. Fluffy emerald-green buds with dark purple undertones, vivid orange pistils, and a heavy white trichome coating make it visually striking for a pre-roll offering. Best consumed during daytime or early evening when the clear-headed focus and euphoric uplift can be fully appreciated without fighting off sedation — ideal for creative tasks, social settings, or light physical activity.

d3006f64125c.lineage: Blueberry Tahoe (DJ Short's Blueberry x Tahoe OG) x Girl Scout Cookies Thin Mints phenotype (OG Kush x Durban Poison, Cookies Fam)
d3006f64125c.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety reduction, mild pain management, appetite stimulation, fatigue, creative blocks, mild insomnia (late onset)
d3006f64125c.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, possible dizziness or paranoia at high doses due to elevated THC (86.4%), potential couch-lock with overconsumption, not recommended for novice users without titration
d3006f64125c.aroma: A lush and inviting bouquet of fresh-picked blueberries and sweet vanilla cookie dough layered over crisp pine resin, with a cool minty exhale that lingers like a berry-laced dessert on the palate.
d3006f64125c.misc: This indica-leaning hybrid draws from two iconic lineages — the fruity, relaxing depth of Blueberry Tahoe and the euphoric, dessert-forward complexity of GSC Thin Mints — making it a well-balanced yet deeply relaxing experience. At 86.4% THC in vape form, this is a high-potency concentrate best suited for experienced consumers; start with 1-2 short pulls and allow 10-15 minutes before redosing. Ideal for evening or late-afternoon use when creativity and relaxation are both welcome, such as artistic projects, social unwinding, or prepping for sleep.

545182529a61.lineage: Chemdawg 91 x Super Skunk (with likely Northern Lights and Skunk #1 ancestry through Super Skunk; popularized by AJ/Original Diesel crew in the early 1990s New York underground scene)
545182529a61.therapeutic: Depression, fatigue, stress, ADHD, mild chronic pain, mood disorders, appetite stimulation
545182529a61.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, anxiety or paranoia at higher doses (especially for THC-sensitive users), headache with overconsumption; not recommended for those prone to sativa-induced racing thoughts
545182529a61.aroma: An assertive, pungent blast of fuel and fermented citrus greets the nose immediately, layered beneath with earthy skunk, sour lemon zest, and a faint herbal sweetness that lingers. The diesel backbone is unmistakable and sharp, giving way to a bright, tangy finish that feels almost effervescent.
545182529a61.misc: Sour Diesel is one of the most iconic and recognizable strains in cannabis history, renowned since the early 90s and frequently topping 'best sativa' lists across major publications and cup competitions. At 14.7% THC this batch sits on the milder end of the typical 18–26% range seen in modern cuts, making it approachable for newer consumers while still delivering functional, heady effects. Buds typically display a light sage-green color with amber trichomes and wispy orange pistils; best consumed in the morning or early afternoon for a productive, socially engaging experience.

72e775ab419b.lineage: Sunset Sherbet x Girl Scout Cookies x Gelato (likely Gelato #33 or #41) — originally bred by Cookies Fam / Sherbinski genetics, with this particular phenotype selected by Redwood County Weed Co
72e775ab419b.therapeutic: Stress relief, mild anxiety, depression, creative blocks, fatigue, mild pain, mood disorders
72e775ab419b.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia at higher doses, possible dizziness for low-tolerance users, may cause overconsumption temptation due to smooth smoke profile
72e775ab419b.aroma: A bright, citrus-forward nose of zesty lemon and ripe cherry bursts upfront, layered beneath with creamy sweetness and a subtle piney earthiness that grounds the fruity complexity. On the exhale, faint tropical and woody undertones emerge, reminiscent of a freshly zested dessert with a sour candy finish.
72e775ab419b.misc: Lemon Cherry Gelato is a widely celebrated hybrid popularized through the Cookies family of genetics and has gained significant shelf presence across legal markets for its dessert-like appeal and balanced effects. At 15.4% THC this batch sits on the moderate end of the spectrum, making it approachable for intermediate consumers without overwhelming novices, though the dominant Myrcene may amplify sedation at higher doses. Buds typically present dense, frosty structures with deep purple and green hues, vivid orange pistils, and a heavy trichome coating — best suited for afternoon or early evening creative sessions.

2fc15c23d6c8.lineage: Durban Poison S1 (self-pollinated Durban Poison) × AVL (Appalachian Valley Line, a regional sativa-dominant cultivar); produced by Campfire Cannabis
2fc15c23d6c8.therapeutic: Depression, fatigue, ADD/ADHD, stress, mild anxiety, creative blocks, low motivation
2fc15c23d6c8.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia or racing thoughts at higher doses, potential overstimulation in anxiety-prone users, not recommended for evening use
2fc15c23d6c8.aroma: Terp Poison opens with a bright, zesty citrus burst layered over a sharp diesel fuel backbone, with a subtle floral sweetness from the ocimene that rounds out the nose. As the bud breaks apart, earthy anise-like undertones inherited from the Durban Poison lineage emerge alongside a faintly spicy, herbal complexity.
2fc15c23d6c8.misc: This sativa-leaning hybrid leans heavily on its Durban Poison S1 heritage, delivering a clean, cerebral, and uplifting experience consistent with South African landrace genetics. At 18.9% THC, Terp Poison sits in a moderate-to-strong range ideal for experienced daytime consumers seeking energy and focus without heavy sedation. Buds typically display light green, elongated structure with amber trichomes and a pronounced terpene-rich frost; best consumed in the morning or early afternoon for productivity-oriented sessions.

f78909fb37f2.lineage: Distillate-based edible (Hybrid cannabis oil extract); no specific strain lineage — formulated with high-potency THC distillate by Voyageur
f78909fb37f2.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety reduction, mild pain management, appetite stimulation, relaxation
f78909fb37f2.negative: Extreme caution advised at 99.5% THC potency — very high risk of overconsumption, paranoia, anxiety, dizziness, dry mouth, impaired coordination, and prolonged psychoactive effects especially for new or low-tolerance users
f78909fb37f2.aroma: As a strawberry-flavored edible, expect a sweet, candy-like strawberry aroma with artificial fruit notes reminiscent of strawberry hard candy or jam. The underlying cannabis scent is largely masked by flavoring agents.
