f78909fb37f2.misc: This is a high-potency THC edible product by Voyageur, dosed at 99.5% THC concentration — consumers should pay close attention to the mg-per-serving listed on the packaging rather than the percentage figure. Onset for edibles typically ranges from 30 to 90 minutes, and effects can last 4 to 8 hours, so patience between doses is critical. Recommended strictly for experienced consumers; beginners should start with the lowest possible dose (2.5–5mg THC) and wait at least two hours before redosing.

89e1c139f216.lineage: Zkittlez x Moonbow (Zkittlez x Do-Si-Dos) — likely bred or popularized by Ethos Genetics or affiliated cultivators; full lineage traces back to Grape Ape x Grapefruit (Zkittlez) crossed with OG Kush Breath x Zkittlez (Do-Si-Dos lineage contributing to Moonbow)
89e1c139f216.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety reduction, mild pain management, mood elevation, appetite stimulation, fatigue
89e1c139f216.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, potential dizziness or mild paranoia at high doses due to elevated THC (84.6%), not recommended for novice consumers in large quantities, possible couch-lock with overconsumption
89e1c139f216.aroma: A vibrant burst of tropical fruit and mixed berry candy greets the nose first, followed by a bright citrus zest of lemon and lime that gives way to subtle floral undertones courtesy of linalool, evoking the experience of cracking open a bag of rainbow-colored candy.
89e1c139f216.misc: Rainbow Belts has gained significant popularity on the West Coast for its dessert-like flavor profile and balanced hybrid effects that lean slightly euphoric and uplifting before settling into relaxed body ease. At 84.6% THC in vape form, this is a high-potency concentrate best suited for experienced consumers; micro-dosing is advised for those with lower tolerance. The Zkittlez and Moonbow parentage consistently produces vibrant, candy-forward terpene profiles, and this strain is best enjoyed during late afternoon or early evening social settings.

829a9b926d61.lineage: Blueberry (DJ Short) × Haze (Original Haze, Santa Cruz, California)
829a9b926d61.therapeutic: Depression, anxiety, chronic pain, fatigue, stress, PTSD, mild nausea, lack of focus
829a9b926d61.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia or anxiety at higher doses, occasional headache, may be overstimulating for those sensitive to sativa-leaning effects
829a9b926d61.aroma: A sweet and inviting burst of fresh blueberries layered over earthy, floral undertones with a subtle spicy herbal finish — think walking through a berry patch with a hint of pine in the cool morning air.
829a9b926d61.misc: Blue Dream was popularized by breeders in the Santa Cruz, California cannabis scene around the mid-2000s and quickly became one of the best-selling strains in the United States. Grasslandz's cut comes in at 15.9% THC, which sits on the moderate end of Blue Dream's typical 17–24% range, making it approachable for newer consumers while still satisfying for experienced users. Buds typically display bright medium-green calyxes with amber pistils and a generous dusting of trichomes; best enjoyed during daytime or early evening for creative tasks, social activities, or productive focus sessions.

d129639aaad3.lineage: GMO (Garlic Cookies) × Rainbow Belts F1 — GMO is a cross of Girl Scout Cookies × Chemdawg (Mamiko Seeds / In House Genetics), while Rainbow Belts is a cross of Zkittlez × Moonbow (Ethos Genetics). Dark Rainbow 1 is bred by Grasslandz.
d129639aaad3.therapeutic: Insomnia, chronic stress, anxiety, mild to moderate pain relief, appetite stimulation, mood elevation
d129639aaad3.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, potential couch-lock at higher doses, mild paranoia in THC-sensitive users, grogginess if used during the day
d129639aaad3.aroma: A pungent and complex bouquet opens with funky, garlic-forward earthiness inherited from GMO, quickly giving way to bright bursts of tropical citrus, sweet berry, and a zesty lime-lemon tang reminiscent of tropical punch candy. A subtle sour dankness and freshly cracked black pepper linger on the exhale, grounding the sweetness with savory depth.
d129639aaad3.misc: Grasslandz is a cultivator known for selecting expressive phenotypes from high-profile crosses. At 16.8% THC, Dark Rainbow 1 sits in a moderate range suitable for intermediate consumers, though its indica-leaning hybrid effects can be potent for beginners. Buds are expected to display dense, resinous structure with deep green hues, possible purple undertones, and a heavy trichome coating reflecting its GMO lineage. Best consumed in the evening or at night given its sleepy and relaxing effect profile — ideal for unwinding after a long day or preparing for restful sleep.

f3e6b0175974.lineage: GG4 (Gorilla Glue #4) × Jokerz #31 (White Runtz × Jet Fuel Gelato) — GG4 originally bred by GG Strains LLC; Jokerz #31 developed by Compound Genetics
f3e6b0175974.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety reduction, mild pain management, appetite stimulation, depression, mental fatigue
f3e6b0175974.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, potential anxiety or paranoia at high doses, mild dizziness, couch-lock with overconsumption due to elevated THC
f3e6b0175974.aroma: A pungent, fuel-forward nose opens with sharp diesel and gasoline notes inherited from GG4, quickly giving way to a surprisingly sweet and fruity undercurrent of tropical floral tones courtesy of Jokerz #31. Earthy, nutty base notes round out the profile, with soft lavender and citrus hints from linalool and valencene adding subtle complexity.
f3e6b0175974.misc: Glue 31 is a potent hybrid cross blending the legendary resin production and chemical funk of Gorilla Glue #4 with the candy-sweet, exotic fruit character of Compound Genetics' Jokerz #31, resulting in a well-balanced head-and-body experience. At 22.3% THC, this is a moderately-strong to strong offering best suited for intermediate to experienced consumers; novices should start slow. Ideal for late afternoon or evening use, the cerebral euphoria onset transitions into full-body relaxation without being fully sedating, making it versatile for both social and wind-down sessions.

d57b1883b7b7.lineage: Dante's Inferno (Oreoz x Devil Driver) infused with Cherry Nirvana terpenes, rolled in kief — Oreoz is a cross of Oreo Cookies x Secret Weapon, Devil Driver is a high-powered hybrid; assembled by Lakeside Canna as a house blend pre-roll
d57b1883b7b7.therapeutic: Stress relief, mood elevation, mild depression, social anxiety, fatigue, appetite stimulation, mild pain relief
d57b1883b7b7.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, potential paranoia or anxiety at high doses due to elevated THC, dizziness for low-tolerance users, possible overconsumption risk due to kief coating boosting potency beyond labeled THC
d57b1883b7b7.aroma: A lush, fruit-forward bouquet opens with ripe dark cherry and citrus zest — think fresh grapefruit peel and sweet orange — layered over an earthy, doughy base with subtle herbal and cookie-like undertones. The kief coating adds a pungent, resinous depth that intensifies the overall aromatic profile considerably.
d57b1883b7b7.misc: This is a Lakeside Canna house creation built around the Dante's Inferno cultivar — a potent hybrid known for dense, trichome-heavy buds with dark purple hues and heavy resin production — enhanced with Cherry Nirvana terpene infusion and a full kief roll for amplified potency. At 25.5% THC on paper, the kief coating effectively pushes the functional experience closer to 30%+, making this best suited for experienced consumers during evening or weekend social sessions. New or low-tolerance users should approach with caution, taking one or two puffs and waiting before continuing.

a1d94f46edc0.lineage: Infused edible product — no specific strain lineage applicable. This is a manufactured cannabis edible by Nebula, dosed at 10mg THC per serving with 10 servings per bar (100mg total).
a1d94f46edc0.therapeutic: Stress relief, mild to moderate pain management, appetite stimulation, sleep aid (at higher doses), anxiety reduction
a1d94f46edc0.negative: Delayed onset (30–120 minutes) may lead to overconsumption; dry mouth, elevated heart rate, anxiety or paranoia if dose exceeded, couch-lock, impaired coordination and cognition, not recommended for first-time consumers without guidance
a1d94f46edc0.aroma: As a gummy edible, this product carries a bright, tart green apple candy scent with a sugary-sweet finish. The aroma is artificially flavored, evoking crisp Granny Smith apple with minimal cannabis odor.
a1d94f46edc0.misc: This is a 100mg THC edible bar by Nebula, broken into 10mg per-piece servings — a standard beginner-to-intermediate dose. New consumers should start with half a serving (5mg) and wait at least 90 minutes before redosing to assess tolerance. Experienced consumers may find 10–20mg appropriate; the THC percentage listed (101%) likely reflects concentration within the infused oil or extract used, not the product as a whole.

487b0db2bda3.lineage: Cannabis-infused edible product by Nebula; no specific strain lineage disclosed. Formulated with distillate or concentrate at 91.6% THC potency per extract used in production.
487b0db2bda3.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety reduction, mild to moderate pain management, appetite stimulation, insomnia support, mood elevation
487b0db2bda3.negative: Overconsumption risk for novice users, dry mouth, elevated heart rate, anxiety or paranoia if dose exceeded, delayed onset may lead to accidental overconsumption, not recommended for those sensitive to THC or with heart conditions
487b0db2bda3.aroma: True to its name, this edible carries a sweet, carnival-style cotton candy aroma with sugary notes of spun sugar and fruity candy undertones. The gummy bar format delivers a confection-forward scent profile with no notable cannabis odor.
487b0db2bda3.misc: Each bar contains 100mg total THC divided into 10mg servings, making it beginner-accessible when dosed carefully. Nebula's Cotton Candy Gummy Bar is formulated with high-potency distillate (91.6% THC), meaning a small amount of extract delivers significant effect. New consumers should start with one serving (10mg), wait 60–90 minutes before redosing, as edible onset varies greatly depending on metabolism, body weight, and whether consumed with food.

b61e85652136.lineage: Blueberry (DJ Short) x Purple Panty Dropper (Exotic Genetix), resulting in a indica-leaning hybrid that carries DJ Short's legendary berry genetics blended with Purple Panty Dropper's grape and floral complexity
b61e85652136.therapeutic: Stress relief, mild anxiety, muscle tension, chronic pain, insomnia onset, mood elevation, appetite stimulation
b61e85652136.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia in THC-sensitive users, potential couch-lock at higher doses, drowsiness if overconsumed
b61e85652136.aroma: A warm, bakery-fresh wave of ripe blueberries and sweet vanilla dough greets the nose, underscored by subtle earthy pine and a faint floral lavender note from the linalool. The overall profile is reminiscent of freshly baked blueberry muffins cooling on a windowsill, rich, fruity, and comforting.
b61e85652136.misc: Blueberry Muffin is a popular strain associated with Humboldt Seed Company as a well-known pheno hunter of this cross, though individual cultivators like Lifted North may run their own selected cuts. At 20.5% THC this is a moderately potent indica-leaning hybrid best suited for late afternoon or evening use when relaxation and mild focus are desired without full sedation. Buds typically display deep purple and forest green hues with a heavy trichome frost and orange pistils, making it as visually appealing as it is aromatic — ideal for consumers seeking calm, creative relaxation without overwhelming sedation.

4df4f8a73ed8.lineage: Likely derived from Orion F1 or similar celestial-named hybrid genetics; potentially crosses involving strains from the OG Kush or Cookies family tree blended with uplifting sativa-leaning genetics. Exact breeder and parentage not publicly confirmed, marketed under Dizgo's proprietary 'drift' strain collection.
4df4f8a73ed8.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety management, mild chronic pain, muscle tension, insomnia (onset), mood elevation, fatigue
4df4f8a73ed8.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, possible drowsiness or couch-lock at higher consumption, mild dizziness in low-tolerance users, may cause overconsedation if paired with other sedatives
4df4f8a73ed8.aroma: Orion opens with a lush, tropical-sweet bouquet of ripe fruit and candy notes layered over a crisp piney backbone, courtesy of ocimene and farnesene's floral, waxy brightness. Myrcene grounds the profile with an earthy, herbal musk while caryophyllene adds a faint warm spice that lingers on the exhale.
4df4f8a73ed8.misc: Dizgo positions Orion as a flagship 'drift' experience — designed for a smooth, unhurried onset that transitions from heady euphoria into full-body ease, making it ideal for late afternoon or early evening use. At 18.2% THC, it sits in an approachable mid-potency range suited for intermediate consumers seeking balance rather than intensity. The pre-roll 2-pack format suggests a social or multi-session experience; novice users are advised to pace consumption given the creeping body-high that may deepen with time.

e019a1dcc69b.lineage: Chem Dog Funk x Auto Varin Lime Sour (Campfire Cannabis)
e019a1dcc69b.therapeutic: Stress relief, muscle tension, anxiety, mild pain management, mood elevation, fatigue
e019a1dcc69b.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, potential paranoia at high doses, couch-lock with heavy consumption, not recommended for low-tolerance users
e019a1dcc69b.aroma: An intensely pungent, barnyard-funk nose hits first with deep diesel fuel and burned rubber, giving way to a sharp, sour citrus bite reminiscent of lime zest cutting through layers of damp earth and chemical gas. The overall bouquet is bold, complex, and unrelenting — a true nod to its Chemdog heritage.
e019a1dcc69b.misc: Bred by Campfire Cannabis, Barnyard High Test pulls its gassy, chemically funky character from the legendary Chemdog lineage while the Auto Varin Lime Sour parentage contributes a tart citrus sharpness and likely contributes to its broad cannabinoid spectrum. At 22% THC, this is a potent option best reserved for experienced consumers, making it ideal as an evening or late-afternoon strain when deep relaxation and euphoric unbothering are the goal. Buds are expected to be dense and resinous with a frosty trichome coat, reflecting its high cannabinoid content and robust terpene profile dominated by the earthy-sedating Myrcene, mood-lifting Limonene, and spicy-peppery Caryophyllene.

544546f4af9b.lineage: Tropicana Cookies x Cherry Cookies (Tropicana Cookies = Girl Scout Cookies x Tangie; Cherry Cookies = Girl Scout Cookies x Cherry Pie) — developed within the Cookies Fam genetic ecosystem
544546f4af9b.therapeutic: Stress relief, mood elevation, mild anxiety management, fatigue, depression, creative blocks, mild pain relief
544546f4af9b.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia at higher doses, possible increased heart rate in THC-sensitive consumers, may be too stimulating for those prone to anxiety
544546f4af9b.aroma: Sharp, zesty citrus bursts forward immediately on the nose, layered with sun-ripened sweet cherry and a subtle backdrop of earthy, toasted nuttiness. The finish is bright and tangy with a candy-like sweetness that lingers pleasantly after the initial citrus punch.
544546f4af9b.misc: Tropicana Cherry sits comfortably in the 15–22% THC range across various phenotypes, making this 15.4% cut approachable for newer consumers while still delivering noticeable effects. Campfire Cannabis presents this strain with oversized forest-green buds featuring rich purple undertones, vivid amber pistils, and a dense frosting of white trichomes that signal quality resin production. Best enjoyed during daytime or early afternoon hours — ideal for creative projects, social outings, or outdoor activities where an uplifted, focused mindset is welcome.

bcda70086ab4.lineage: Grape Pie x Wedding Crasher (Grape Pie = Grape Stomper x Cherry Pie; Wedding Crasher = Wedding Cake x Purple Punch) — breeding attribution associated with Symbiotic Genetics
bcda70086ab4.therapeutic: Insomnia, chronic pain, muscle tension, anxiety, stress relief, appetite stimulation, mild depression
bcda70086ab4.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, potential dizziness at higher doses, couch-lock, may cause heavy sedation — use caution if operating machinery or if sensitive to indica-dominant effects
bcda70086ab4.aroma: A lush, dessert-forward bouquet of ripe crushed grapes and sweet cherry jam layered over creamy vanilla frosting, with a subtle earthy spice and nutty undertone that lingers on the exhale. The overall scent profile is rich, smooth, and indulgent — reminiscent of a chilled fruit tart dusted with sugar.
bcda70086ab4.misc: Grape Cream Cake is a visually striking cultivar with bright neon-green buds accented by vivid orange pistils and a heavy coating of purple-tinted trichomes, reflecting its Purple Punch heritage. At 22.3% THC with a dominant myrcene, linalool, and caryophyllene terpene profile, this strain is best reserved for evening or nighttime use when full relaxation and sedation are welcome. Consumers new to indica-heavy hybrids should start slow, as the creeping body effect can intensify significantly 20–30 minutes post-inhalation.

299f063bcfee.lineage: Cinderella 99 x Jack Herer x Skunk #1 — believed to have roots in Haze genetics as well; popularized by Dutch breeders in Amsterdam, with Soma Seeds and other Netherlands-based cultivators commonly credited for stabilizing the modern Amnesia Haze lineage
299f063bcfee.therapeutic: Stress relief, depression, fatigue, anxiety (low doses), lack of focus, mood disorders, mild pain, creative blocks
299f063bcfee.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, paranoia or anxiety at high doses, dizziness, racing thoughts — not recommended for novice users or those sensitive to high-THC sativa-dominant cultivars; avoid before sleep
299f063bcfee.aroma: A sharp, zesty burst of fresh lemon and citrus peel opens immediately, layered beneath with earthy pine resin and a faintly sweet, spicy undertone that lingers on the exhale — bright, clean, and invigorating throughout.
299f063bcfee.misc: Amnesia (often marketed as Amnesia Haze) is one of Amsterdam's most celebrated coffee shop staples, winning 1st place at the Cannabis Cup 2014 and the Sativa Cup 2012, cementing its legendary status in the cannabis community. In its flower form it typically tests between 20–25% THC, making this 85.5% vape concentrate a significantly more potent delivery format requiring cautious, measured dosing — especially for occasional consumers. Best suited for daytime or early afternoon use, this strain excels during creative projects, social gatherings, or active outdoor activities where mental energy and euphoric uplift are desired.

ef28e34f66ec.lineage: Cherry Kush x (Lemon Tree Papaya x GMO) x FroDo (Northpark / independent cultivar blend; exact breeder origin unconfirmed but draws from Cookies-adjacent and exotic hybrid lineage)
ef28e34f66ec.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety reduction, mild pain management, mood elevation, appetite stimulation, mental fatigue
ef28e34f66ec.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia at higher doses, potential dizziness for low-tolerance users, grogginess if overconsumed despite sativa lean
ef28e34f66ec.aroma: Zesty Parm bursts open with sharp lemon zest and tangy citrus up front, quickly giving way to an earthy, herbal base with subtle garlicky and funky undertones inherited from its GMO parentage. A creamy, almost parmesan-like sour spice lingers on the exhale, making the name feel remarkably on point.
ef28e34f66ec.misc: At 18.8% THC with a dominant terpene profile of Myrcene and Limonene, this batch skews sativa-leaning despite its indica-dominant classification, making it well-suited for daytime or early evening use when focus and calm are both desired. Buds are typically dense with a frosty trichome coating, displaying deep greens with amber pistils reflecting its Kush and GMO heritage. Consumers seeking creative focus with a relaxed body undertone will find this batch particularly effective — best approached with moderate dosing given its unpredictable indica-sativa expression batch to batch.

65ec8d5fbc0c.lineage: True OG x Strawberry Banana x Blackberry (Northpark selection; True OG derived from Kush lineage, Strawberry Banana from Serious Seeds via Banana OG x Strawberry OG, Blackberry from DJ Short / Nirvana heritage)
65ec8d5fbc0c.therapeutic: Stress relief, mild anxiety reduction, fatigue, mood elevation, mild pain management, creative blocks, low-grade depression
65ec8d5fbc0c.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia at higher doses, occasional headache in sensitive users, overconsumption may cause drowsiness despite energetic classification
65ec8d5fbc0c.aroma: Gummi Bears opens with a burst of ripe mixed berries and sun-warmed citrus zest, underpinned by a doughy sweetness reminiscent of candy and fresh fruit punch. Subtle earthy pine and a faint peppery spice from the caryophyllene linger on the exhale, keeping the profile grounded and complex.
65ec8d5fbc0c.misc: Gummi Bears is a Northpark house hybrid selection bred to deliver a balanced, approachable experience with its moderate 18.2% THC — well-suited for intermediate consumers or cautious beginners. Buds typically display dense, chunky structure with bright green coloration, orange pistils, and a generous trichome coating that reflects its OG heritage. Best consumed during late morning or early afternoon when the energetic and focused effects can be fully utilized without disrupting evening sleep.

05f86efba14c.lineage: Amnesia S1 x Black Lime GMO (one component) blended with Cherry Kush x (Lemon Tree/Papaya x GMO) (second component); a Northpark proprietary house blend combining Amnesia Haze self-cross genetics, Black Lime Reserve, GMO (Garlic Cookies), Cherry Kush, Lemon Tree, and Papaya lineage
05f86efba14c.therapeutic: Stress relief, mild chronic pain, anxiety reduction, mood elevation, appetite stimulation, mild insomnia support
05f86efba14c.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, possible mild paranoia at higher doses for THC-sensitive consumers, mild dizziness; couch-lock potential increases with prolonged use due to indica-leaning terpene profile
05f86efba14c.aroma: A complex and layered nose opens with bright citrus and tart lemon zest underpinned by ripe tropical fruit and sweet berry, before settling into a pungent diesel and funky garlic-earth base inherited from the GMO genetics. The overall bouquet is simultaneously fruity and fuel-forward, with a sweet candy finish that lingers pleasantly.
05f86efba14c.misc: This is a Northpark in-house blended pre-roll combining two distinct genetic crosses to create a balanced indica-leaning hybrid experience; at 14.2% THC it sits on the moderate end, making it approachable for intermediate consumers while remaining functional rather than sedating. The blend likely produces dense, resinous flower with purple-tinged hues and orange pistils from the Cherry Kush and Papaya parentage. Best suited for late afternoon or early evening use when relaxation is desired without full sedation.

66477ce1c142.lineage: Purple Kush x Lemon Skunk (Campfire Cannabis)
66477ce1c142.therapeutic: Stress relief, mild anxiety, creative blocks, mild depression, fatigue, appetite stimulation
66477ce1c142.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia at higher doses, potential drowsiness as effects progress into the indica-leaning come-down
66477ce1c142.aroma: Bright bursts of zesty lemon candy and sweet citrus peel open the nose, gradually giving way to soft berry sweetness and a grounding layer of earthy, floral undertones. The overall aromatic experience is refreshing and uplifting, reminiscent of a freshly squeezed pink lemonade with a subtle kushy depth.
66477ce1c142.misc: Pink Lemonade is a Campfire Cannabis offering bred from the classic indica Purple Kush and the energetic, citrus-forward Lemon Skunk — a pairing that balances relaxing body warmth with a bright, mood-lifting head effect. At 18.2% THC it sits in an approachable mid-to-upper range, making it well-suited for intermediate consumers looking for daytime creativity or a relaxed late-afternoon session without heavy sedation. Minty-green spade-shaped buds are visually striking with light orange pistils and a dense coating of golden trichomes; best enjoyed in the late afternoon or early evening when creative focus and gentle relaxation are equally welcome.

4ae59f844af9.lineage: Tahoe OG x Runtz (Campfire Cannabis / breeder unconfirmed; Runtz itself is Zkittlez x Gelato by Cookies Fam)
4ae59f844af9.therapeutic: Stress relief, anxiety reduction, mild to moderate chronic pain, muscle tension, insomnia onset, mood elevation, appetite stimulation
4ae59f844af9.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, potential dizziness or paranoia at high doses due to elevated THC (24.3%), possible couch-lock with heavy consumption, not recommended for low-tolerance users before physical activity
4ae59f844af9.aroma: Rich, dank earth anchored by classic kush and woody pine opens the nose, quickly layered with bright bursts of sweet citrus and tropical fruit that give it a creamy, almost dessert-like complexity. A subtle floral spice from linalool and a faint herbal whisper from humulene and ocimene round out the finish.
4ae59f844af9.misc: Lit OG blends the legendary potency and deep body sedation of Tahoe OG with the sweet, creamy fruit profile and euphoric lift of Runtz, resulting in an indica-dominant hybrid that punches well above average at 24.3% THC. Oversized olive-green nugs with purple accents, dense orange pistils, and a thick trichome frost make this a visually striking flower. Best consumed in the evening or late afternoon for winding down — the initial euphoric clarity is approachable, but the long-wave body relaxation makes this a poor choice for daytime productivity.

c609701a342f.lineage: Mango-flavored THC gummy edible by Voyageur — not a flower strain. No genetic lineage applicable; this is a manufactured edible product with extracted cannabis oil.
c609701a342f.therapeutic: Stress relief, mild to moderate pain management, anxiety reduction, sleep aid, appetite stimulation, mood elevation
c609701a342f.negative: Delayed onset (30–120 minutes) may lead to overconsumption; dry mouth, dry eyes, increased heart rate, paranoia or anxiety at high doses, impaired coordination and cognitive function, prolonged intoxication (4–8 hours)
c609701a342f.aroma: As a gummy edible, the sensory experience is flavor-forward rather than aromatic — expect a sweet, tropical mango candy scent with little to no detectable cannabis odor, making it discreet and palatable.
c609701a342f.misc: Each gummy contains 10mg THC, a standard single dose recommended for beginner to intermediate consumers. New users should start with half a gummy (5mg) and wait at least 90 minutes before redosing, as edible effects vary greatly based on metabolism, body weight, and tolerance. The 94.1% THC figure reflects the concentration of the extract used, not the per-gummy dose — each piece delivers a well-controlled 10mg serving for predictable, consistent effects.

8003f2b26a89.lineage: (Amnesia S1 x Black Lime GMO) x (Cherry Kush x [Lemon Tree x Papaya x GMO]) — Northpark house blend; Amnesia Haze lineage traces to Neville's Haze/South Asian and Jamaican landrace roots; GMO (Garlic Cookies) by Mamiko Seeds; Lemon Tree by Alien Labs; Papaya by Nirvana Seeds
8003f2b26a89.therapeutic: Stress relief, mild chronic pain, anxiety reduction, mood elevation, muscle tension, appetite stimulation, fatigue
8003f2b26a89.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia or anxiety in THC-sensitive users, potential couch-lock in higher doses despite moderate THC, slight dizziness for novice consumers
8003f2b26a89.aroma: A complex, layered nose opens with bright citrus zest and tropical fruit sweetness before giving way to a funky, garlicky diesel undercurrent inherited from the GMO parentage, with subtle berry and lime notes rounding out the exhale. The overall profile is simultaneously bright and dank, striking an interesting balance between candy-like sweetness and pungent earthiness.
8003f2b26a89.misc: Produced by Northpark as a proprietary blended pre-roll, this indica-leaning hybrid sits at a relatively approachable 14.2% THC, making it well-suited for intermediate consumers or those sensitive to high-potency products. The combination of Myrcene and Limonene drives the relaxing yet uplifting effect profile, while Caryophyllene adds a subtle spicy bite and potential anti-inflammatory benefit. Best consumed in the early evening when you want to unwind without full sedation; the cerebral lift from the Amnesia and Lemon Tree genetics prevents it from being a pure couch-lock experience.

2457a561c047.lineage: Infused edible product — no specific cannabis strain lineage; formulated with distillate or broad-spectrum extract by Nebula brand. Genetic lineage not applicable for this edible format.
2457a561c047.therapeutic: Mild to moderate pain relief, stress and anxiety reduction, appetite stimulation, sleep aid at higher doses, mood elevation
2457a561c047.negative: Delayed onset (30–90 minutes) may lead to overconsumption; dry mouth, increased heart rate, dizziness, anxiety or paranoia at high doses, couch-lock, impaired coordination — avoid driving or operating machinery
2457a561c047.aroma: As a gummy bar, expect a bright and tangy cherry-forward sweetness layered with zesty lime citrus, creating a candy-like confection aroma reminiscent of classic fruit chews. The scent is clean, artificial-fruity, and dessert-like with no notable cannabis odor.
2457a561c047.misc: Each bar contains 100mg total THC with 10mg per serving (10 servings per bar), making it well-suited for beginner to intermediate consumers using one piece at a time. Nebula formats this as a standard low-dose entry point — beginners should start with half a serving (5mg) and wait at least 90 minutes before redosing. At 91.6% THC potency in the extract used, this product is highly concentrated at the formulation stage, so precise dosing per piece is critical for a comfortable experience.

7e6663765314.lineage: Lemon Skunk x Purple Kush (Campfire Cannabis); Lemon Skunk itself is a cross of two Skunk phenotypes selected for lemon traits, while Purple Kush is a pure indica landrace cross of Hindu Kush x Purple Afghani originating from Oakland, CA
7e6663765314.therapeutic: Stress relief, mild depression, mental fatigue, lack of focus, mood elevation, mild anxiety, creative blocks
7e6663765314.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia at higher doses, potential for mild headache in sensitive users; not ideal for those prone to anxiety as the energetic uplift may feel overstimulating
7e6663765314.aroma: A bright and zesty burst of fresh-squeezed lemon and grapefruit rind greets the nose immediately, underpinned by a subtly sweet, floral herbal quality from the ocimene and a faint piney earthiness that adds depth and balance. The overall bouquet is clean, refreshing, and citrus-forward with just enough skunky sweetness from its Lemon Skunk heritage to keep it interesting.
7e6663765314.misc: Pink Lemonade as a variety is most commonly attributed to breeders working with West Coast citrus and kush genetics, and Campfire Cannabis has packaged this phenotype as a approachable hybrid pre-roll sitting at 18.2% THC — a moderate-to-solid potency suitable for intermediate consumers. Buds typically display light green coloration with occasional purple undertones inherited from the Purple Kush parent, coated in a moderate layer of trichomes. Best consumed during daytime or early afternoon hours given its energetic and focus-driven effect profile, making it a strong choice for creative work, social activities, or outdoor adventures.

46c01c7585d2.lineage: Edible product — no genetic strain lineage applicable. Blue Raspberry is a flavored gummy format by Voyageur, dosed at 10mg THC per gummy with 10 gummies per pack (100mg total THC).
46c01c7585d2.therapeutic: Stress relief, mild to moderate pain management, anxiety reduction, sleep support, appetite stimulation, mood elevation
46c01c7585d2.negative: Overconsumption risk due to delayed onset (30–120 minutes); potential anxiety or paranoia at high doses, dry mouth, increased heart rate, impaired coordination and cognition, not recommended for cannabis-naive users to exceed one gummy without waiting
46c01c7585d2.aroma: As a gummy edible, the sensory experience is flavor-forward rather than aromatic — expect a sweet, candy-like blue raspberry scent reminiscent of artificial berry confections with a tart, fruity finish. There is no cannabis aroma present in the final product.
46c01c7585d2.misc: Each gummy contains a precise 10mg THC dose, making this product well-suited for both beginner and experienced consumers who prefer portion control. New users should start with half a gummy (5mg) and wait at least 90 minutes before redosing to avoid overconsumption. Voyageur's gummy format offers a discreet, smoke-free consumption method ideal for on-the-go use or social settings where discretion is preferred.

5c5d3effa041.lineage: Blueberry (DJ Short) x Haze (Santa Cruz Haze phenotype) — popularized by DJ Short and widely propagated by Santa Cruz-area breeders in Northern California
5c5d3effa041.therapeutic: Depression, chronic stress, anxiety, fatigue, mild pain, headaches, lack of focus, PTSD, mood disorders
5c5d3effa041.negative: Dry mouth, dry eyes, mild paranoia or anxiety in THC-sensitive users, occasional dizziness at higher doses — lower-than-average THC (12.4%) makes overconsumption effects less likely but still possible for novice consumers
5c5d3effa041.aroma: A lush wave of sweet blueberry and ripe summer fruit opens immediately on the nose, underscored by a bright piney freshness and a subtle earthy spice from the caryophyllene. A gentle vanilla-herbal backdrop lingers like a whiff of Haze ancestry, making the overall bouquet both sweet and grounding.
5c5d3effa041.misc: Blue Dream is one of the most iconic and best-selling strains in the United States, consistently appearing at the top of Leafly and Weedmaps sales charts for over a decade. At 12.4% THC this is a mild-to-moderate expression of the strain — ideal for beginners, daytime users, or those seeking functional euphoria without heavy sedation. Buds typically present as medium-to-large, fluffy and elongated with a sativa-leaning structure, bright green with amber pistils and a light dusting of trichomes; best consumed in the morning or early afternoon for creative work, social settings, or outdoor activities.
